ar: ۞قَالَ أَلَمۡ أَقُل لَّكَ إِنَّكَ لَن تَسۡتَطِيعَ مَعِيَ صَبۡرࣰ ا
t: Qala alam aqul laka innaka lan tastateeAAa maAAiya sabran
u: Usne kaha “maine tumse kaha na tha ke tum mere saath sabr nahin kar sakte?”

ar: قَالَ إِن سَأَلۡتُكَ عَن شَيۡءِۭ بَعۡدَهَا فَلَا تُصَٰحِبۡنِيۖ قَدۡ بَلَغۡتَ مِن لَّدُنِّي عُذۡرࣰ ا
t: Qala in saaltuka AAan shayin baAAdaha fala tusahibnee qad balaghta min ladunnee AAuthran
u: Moosa ne kaha “iske baad agar main aap se kuch puchoon to aap mujhey saat na rakhein. Lijiye ab to meri taraf se aapko uzr (excuse) mil gaya”

ar: فَٱنطَلَقَا حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَتَيَآ أَهۡلَ قَرۡيَةٍ ٱسۡتَطۡعَمَآ أَهۡلَهَا فَأَبَوۡاْ أَن يُضَيِّفُوهُمَا فَوَجَدَا فِيهَا جِدَارࣰ ا يُرِيدُ أَن يَنقَضَّ فَأَقَامَهُۥۖ قَالَ لَوۡ شِئۡتَ لَتَّخَذۡتَ عَلَيۡهِ أَجۡرࣰ ا
t: Faintalaqa hatta itha ataya ahla qaryatin istatAAama ahlaha faabaw an yudayyifoohuma fawajada feeha jidaran yureedu an yanqadda faaqamahu qala law shita laittakhathta AAalayhi ajran
u: Phir woh aage chale yahan tak ke ek basti mein pahunche aur wahan ke logon se khana maanga magar unhon ne un dono ke ziyafat se inkar kardiya. Wahan unhon ne ek deewaar dekhi jo gira chahti thi(about to fall down). Us shaks ne us deewaar ko phir qayam kardiya. Moosa ne kaha “ agar aap chahte to is kaam ki ujrat le sakte thay”

ar: قَالَ هَٰذَا فِرَاقُ بَيۡنِي وَبَيۡنِكَۚ سَأُنَبِّئُكَ بِتَأۡوِيلِ مَا لَمۡ تَسۡتَطِع عَّلَيۡهِ صَبۡرًا
t: Qala hatha firaqu baynee wabaynika saonabbioka bitaweeli ma lam tastatiAA AAalayhi sabran
u: Usne kaha “ bas mera tumhara saath khatam hua. Ab main tumhein un baaton ki haqeeqat batata hoon jinpar tum sabr na kar sakey

ar: أَمَّا ٱلسَّفِينَةُ فَكَانَتۡ لِمَسَٰكِينَ يَعۡمَلُونَ فِي ٱلۡبَحۡرِ فَأَرَدتُّ أَنۡ أَعِيبَهَا وَكَانَ وَرَآءَهُم مَّلِكࣱ يَأۡخُذُ كُلَّ سَفِينَةٍ غَصۡبࣰ ا
t: Amma alssafeenatu fakanat limasakeena yaAAmaloona fee albahri faaradtu an aAAeebaha wakana waraahum malikun yakhuthu kulla safeenatin ghasban
u: Us kashti ka maamla yeh hai ke woh chandh gareeb aadmiyon ki thi jo dariya mein mehnat mazdoori karte thay.Maine chaha ke usey aiebdar (damaged) kardoon, kyunke aagey ek aise baadshah ka ilaqa tha jo har kashti ko zabardasti cheen leta tha

ar: وَأَمَّا ٱلۡغُلَٰمُ فَكَانَ أَبَوَاهُ مُؤۡمِنَيۡنِ فَخَشِينَآ أَن يُرۡهِقَهُمَا طُغۡيَٰنࣰ ا وَكُفۡرࣰ ا
t: Waamma alghulamu fakana abawahu muminayni fakhasheena an yurhiqahuma tughyanan wakufran
u: Raha woh ladka, to uske walidain momin thay, humein andesha hua ke yeh ladka apni sarkashi aur kufr se unko tangg karega

ar: فَأَرَدۡنَآ أَن يُبۡدِلَهُمَا رَبُّهُمَا خَيۡرࣰ ا مِّنۡهُ زَكَوٰةࣰ وَأَقۡرَبَ رُحۡمࣰ ا
t: Faaradna an yubdilahuma rabbuhuma khayran minhu zakatan waaqraba ruhman
u: Isliye humne chaha ke unka Rubb uske badle unko aisi aur aulad dey jo akhlaq mein bhi ussey behtar ho aur jisse sila rehmi bhi zyada mutawaqqe ho

ar: وَأَمَّا ٱلۡجِدَارُ فَكَانَ لِغُلَٰمَيۡنِ يَتِيمَيۡنِ فِي ٱلۡمَدِينَةِ وَكَانَ تَحۡتَهُۥ كَنزࣱ لَّهُمَا وَكَانَ أَبُوهُمَا صَٰلِحࣰ ا فَأَرَادَ رَبُّكَ أَن يَبۡلُغَآ أَشُدَّهُمَا وَيَسۡتَخۡرِجَا كَنزَهُمَا رَحۡمَةࣰ مِّن رَّبِّكَۚ وَمَا فَعَلۡتُهُۥ عَنۡ أَمۡرِيۚ ذَٰلِكَ تَأۡوِيلُ مَا لَمۡ تَسۡطِع عَّلَيۡهِ صَبۡرࣰ ا
t: Waamma aljidaru fakana lighulamayni yateemayni fee almadeenati wakana tahtahu kanzun lahuma wakana aboohuma salihan faarada rabbuka an yablugha ashuddahuma wayastakhrija kanzahuma rahmatan min rabbika wama faAAaltuhu AAan amree thalika taweelu ma lam tastiAA AAalayhi sabran
u: Aur is deewar ka maamla yeh hai ke yeh do yateem ladkon ki hai jo is shehar mein rehte hain. Is deewar ke neechey in bacchon ke liye ek khazana madfoon (buried) hai. Aur inka baap ek neik aadmi tha , isliye tumhare Rubb ne chaha ke yeh dono bacchey baalig (mature) hon aur apna khazana nikal lein. Yeh tumhare Rubb ki rehmat ki bina par kiya gaya hai, maine kuch apne ikhtiyar se nahin kardiya hai. Yeh hai haqeeqat un baaton ki jinpar tum sabr na kar sakey”

ar: وَيَسۡـَٔلُونَكَ عَن ذِي ٱلۡقَرۡنَيۡنِۖ قُلۡ سَأَتۡلُواْ عَلَيۡكُم مِّنۡهُ ذِكۡرًا
t: Wayasaloonaka AAan thee alqarnayni qul saatloo AAalaykum minhu thikran
u: Aur (aey Muhammad), yeh log tumse Zul-Qarnain ke barey mein puchte hain, Insey kaho, main iska kuch haal tumko sunata hoon

ar: إِنَّا مَكَّنَّا لَهُۥ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَءَاتَيۡنَٰهُ مِن كُلِّ شَيۡءࣲ سَبَبࣰ ا
t: Inna makkanna lahu fee alardi waataynahu min kulli shayin sababan
u: Humne usko zameen mein iqtedar ata kar rakkha tha aur usey har qisam ke asbaab o wasail bakshe thay

ar: فَأَتۡبَعَ سَبَبًا
t: FaatbaAAa sababan
u: Usne (pehle magrib ki taraf ek mohim ka) sar o samaan kiya

ar: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا بَلَغَ مَغۡرِبَ ٱلشَّمۡسِ وَجَدَهَا تَغۡرُبُ فِي عَيۡنٍ حَمِئَةࣲ وَوَجَدَ عِندَهَا قَوۡمࣰ اۖ قُلۡنَا يَٰذَا ٱلۡقَرۡنَيۡنِ إِمَّآ أَن تُعَذِّبَ وَإِمَّآ أَن تَتَّخِذَ فِيهِمۡ حُسۡنࣰ ا
t: Hatta itha balagha maghriba alshshamsi wajadaha taghrubu fee AAaynin hamiatin wawajada AAindaha qawman qulna ya tha alqarnayni imma an tuAAaththiba waimma an tattakhitha feehim husnan
u: Hatta ke jab woh guroob e aftaab(sunset) ki hadd tak pahunch gaya to usne Suraj ko ek kalay pani mein doobte dekha aur wahan usey ek qaum mili. Humne kaha “aey Zul-Qarnain, tujhey yeh maqdarat (power) bhi haasil hai ke inko takleef pahunchye aur yeh bhi ke inke saath neik rawayya ikhtiyar karey”

ar: قَالَ أَمَّا مَن ظَلَمَ فَسَوۡفَ نُعَذِّبُهُۥ ثُمَّ يُرَدُّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ فَيُعَذِّبُهُۥ عَذَابࣰ ا نُّكۡرࣰ ا
t: Qala amma man thalama fasawfa nuAAaththibuhu thumma yuraddu ila rabbihi fayuAAaththibuhu AAathaban nukran
u: Usne kaha, “jo inmein se zulm karega hum usko saza denge, phir woh apne Rubb ki taraf paltaya jayega aur woh usey aur zyada sakht azaab dega

ar: وَأَمَّا مَنۡ ءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحࣰ ا فَلَهُۥ جَزَآءً ٱلۡحُسۡنَىٰۖ وَسَنَقُولُ لَهُۥ مِنۡ أَمۡرِنَا يُسۡرࣰ ا
t: Waamma man amana waAAamila salihan falahu jazaan alhusna wasanaqoolu lahu min amrina yusran
u: Aur jo inmein se iman layega aur neik amal karega uske liye acchi jaza hai aur hum usko narm ehkam denge”

ar: ثُمَّ أَتۡبَعَ سَبَبًا
t: Thumma atbaAAa sababan
u: Phir usne (ek dusri mohim ki) tayyari ki

ar: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا بَلَغَ مَطۡلِعَ ٱلشَّمۡسِ وَجَدَهَا تَطۡلُعُ عَلَىٰ قَوۡمࣲ لَّمۡ نَجۡعَل لَّهُم مِّن دُونِهَا سِتۡرࣰ ا
t: Hatta itha balagha matliAAa alshshamsi wajadaha tatluAAu AAala qawmin lam najAAal lahum min dooniha sitran
u: Yahan tak ke tulu e aftaab (sun rise) ki hadd tak ja pahuncha. Wahan usne dekha ke Suraj ek aisi qaum par tulu (rise) ho raha hai jiske liye dhoop se bachne ka koi samaan humne nahin kiya hai

ar: كَذَٰلِكَۖ وَقَدۡ أَحَطۡنَا بِمَا لَدَيۡهِ خُبۡرࣰ ا
t: Kathalika waqad ahatna bima ladayhi khubran
u: Yeh haal tha unka, aur Zul-Qarnain ke paas jo kuch tha usey hum jantey thay

ar: ثُمَّ أَتۡبَعَ سَبَبًا
t: Thumma atbaAAa sababan
u: Phir usne (ek aur mohim ka) samaan kiya

ar: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا بَلَغَ بَيۡنَ ٱلسَّدَّيۡنِ وَجَدَ مِن دُونِهِمَا قَوۡمࣰ ا لَّا يَكَادُونَ يَفۡقَهُونَ قَوۡلࣰ ا
t: Hatta itha balagha bayna alssaddayni wajada min doonihima qawman la yakadoona yafqahoona qawlan
u: Yahan tak ke jab do pahadon ke darmiyan pahuncha to usey unke paas ek qaum mili jo mushkil hi se koi baat samajhti thi

ar: قَالُواْ يَٰذَا ٱلۡقَرۡنَيۡنِ إِنَّ يَأۡجُوجَ وَمَأۡجُوجَ مُفۡسِدُونَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَهَلۡ نَجۡعَلُ لَكَ خَرۡجًا عَلَىٰٓ أَن تَجۡعَلَ بَيۡنَنَا وَبَيۡنَهُمۡ سَدࣰّ ا
t: Qaloo ya tha alqarnayni inna yajooja wamajooja mufsidoona fee alardi fahal najAAalu laka kharjan AAala an tajAAala baynana wabaynahum saddan
u: Un logon ne kaha “aey Zul-Qarnain, yaajuj aur maajuj is sar-zameen mein fasad phailatey hain to kya hum tujhey koi tax (tribute) is kaam ke liye dein ke tu hamare aur inke darmiyan ek bandh (barrier) taamir karde?”

ar: قَالَ مَا مَكَّنِّي فِيهِ رَبِّي خَيۡرࣱ فَأَعِينُونِي بِقُوَّةٍ أَجۡعَلۡ بَيۡنَكُمۡ وَبَيۡنَهُمۡ رَدۡمًا
t: Qala ma makkannee feehi rabbee khayrun faaAAeenoonee biquwwatin ajAAal baynakum wabaynahum radman
u: Usne kaha “jo kuch mere Rubb ne mujhey de rakkha hai woh bahut hai. Tum bas mehnat se meri madad karo, main tumhare aur inke darmiyan bandh(barrier) banaye deta hoon

ar: ءَاتُونِي زُبَرَ ٱلۡحَدِيدِۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا سَاوَىٰ بَيۡنَ ٱلصَّدَفَيۡنِ قَالَ ٱنفُخُواْۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَعَلَهُۥ نَارࣰ ا قَالَ ءَاتُونِيٓ أُفۡرِغۡ عَلَيۡهِ قِطۡرࣰ ا
t: Atoonee zubara alhadeedi hatta itha sawa bayna alsadafayni qala onfukhoo hatta itha jaAAalahu naran qala atoonee ofrigh AAalayhi qitran
u: Mujhey lohey ki chadarein (sheets) laakar do”. Aakhir jab dono pahadon ke darmiyani khala (space) ko usne paat diya to logon se kaha ke ab aag dehkao. Hatta ke jab [yeh ahani deewaar(iron-wall)] bilkul aag ki tarah surkh(red-hot) ho gayi to usne kaha “ lao, ab main ispar pigla hua taamba (molten brass) undailunga (pour)”

ar: فَمَا ٱسۡطَٰعُوٓاْ أَن يَظۡهَرُوهُ وَمَا ٱسۡتَطَٰعُواْ لَهُۥ نَقۡبࣰ ا
t: Fama istaAAoo an yathharoohu wama istataAAoo lahu naqban
u: (yeh bandh aisa tha ke) yaajuj o maajuj ispar chadh kar bhi na aa saktey thay aur ismein naqab lagana (scale over it) unke liye aur bhi mushkil tha

ar: قَالَ هَٰذَا رَحۡمَةࣱ مِّن رَّبِّيۖ فَإِذَا جَآءَ وَعۡدُ رَبِّي جَعَلَهُۥ دَكَّآءَۖ وَكَانَ وَعۡدُ رَبِّي حَقࣰّ ا
t: Qala hatha rahmatun min rabbee faitha jaa waAAdu rabbee jaAAalahu dakkaa wakana waAAdu rabbee haqqan
u: Zul-Qarnain ne kaha “yeh mere Rubb ki rehmat hai, magar jab mere Rubb ke wadey ka waqt aayega to woh isko paiwand e khaak kardega, aur mere Rubb ka wada bar-haqq hai”

ar: ۞وَتَرَكۡنَا بَعۡضَهُمۡ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ يَمُوجُ فِي بَعۡضࣲۖ وَنُفِخَ فِي ٱلصُّورِ فَجَمَعۡنَٰهُمۡ جَمۡعࣰ ا
t: Watarakna baAAdahum yawmaithin yamooju fee baAAdin wanufikha fee alssoori fajamaAAnahum jamAAan
u: Aur us roz hum logon ko chodh denge ke (samandar ki maujon ki tarah) ek dusre se gutham gutha (come close together tumultuously) hon aur sur (trumphet) phoonka jaayega aur hum sab Insaano ko ek saath jamaa karenge

ar: وَعَرَضۡنَا جَهَنَّمَ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ لِّلۡكَٰفِرِينَ عَرۡضًا
t: WaAAaradna jahannama yawmaithin lilkafireena AAardan
u: Aur woh din hoga jab hum jahannum ko kafiron ke saamne layenge

ar: ٱلَّذِينَ كَانَتۡ أَعۡيُنُهُمۡ فِي غِطَآءٍ عَن ذِكۡرِي وَكَانُواْ لَا يَسۡتَطِيعُونَ سَمۡعًا
t: Allatheena kanat aAAyunuhum fee ghitain AAan thikree wakanoo la yastateeAAoona samAAan
u: Un kafiron ke saamne jo meri naseehat ki taraf se andhey baney huey thay aur kuch sunne keliye tayyar hi na thay

ar: أَفَحَسِبَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓاْ أَن يَتَّخِذُواْ عِبَادِي مِن دُونِيٓ أَوۡلِيَآءَۚ إِنَّآ أَعۡتَدۡنَا جَهَنَّمَ لِلۡكَٰفِرِينَ نُزُلࣰ ا
t: Afahasiba allatheena kafaroo an yattakhithoo AAibadee min doonee awliyaa inna aAAtadna jahannama lilkafireena nuzulan
u: To kya yeh log, jinhon ne kufr ikhtiyar kiya hai, yeh khayal rakhte hain ke mujhey chodh kar mere bandon ko apna kaarsaaz bana lein? Humne aisey kafiron ki ziyafat ke liye jahannum tayyar kar rakkhi hai

ar: قُلۡ هَلۡ نُنَبِّئُكُم بِٱلۡأَخۡسَرِينَ أَعۡمَٰلًا
t: Qul hal nunabbiokum bialakhsareena aAAmalan
u: (Aey Muhammad), insey kaho, kya hum tumhein batayein ke apne aamaal mein sabse zyada nakaam o na-murad log kaun hain

ar: ٱلَّذِينَ ضَلَّ سَعۡيُهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنۡيَا وَهُمۡ يَحۡسَبُونَ أَنَّهُمۡ يُحۡسِنُونَ صُنۡعًا
t: Allatheena dalla saAAyuhum fee alhayati alddunya wahum yahsaboona annahum yuhsinoona sunAAan
u: Woh ke duniya ki zindagi mein jinki saari saii-o-jahad (endeavours/ efforts) raah e raast se bhatki rahi aur woh samajhte rahey ke woh sab kuch theek kar rahey hain

ar: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ وَلِقَآئِهِۦ فَحَبِطَتۡ أَعۡمَٰلُهُمۡ فَلَا نُقِيمُ لَهُمۡ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ وَزۡنࣰ ا
t: Olaika allatheena kafaroo biayati rabbihim waliqaihi fahabitat aAAmaluhum fala nuqeemu lahum yawma alqiyamati waznan
u: Yeh woh log hain jinhon ne apne Rubb ki aayat ko maanne se inkar kiya aur uske huzoor pehsi ka yaqeen na kiya. Isliye unke saarey aamal zaaya ho gaye, qayamat ke roz hum unhein koi wazan(weight) na denge

ar: ذَٰلِكَ جَزَآؤُهُمۡ جَهَنَّمُ بِمَا كَفَرُواْ وَٱتَّخَذُوٓاْ ءَايَٰتِي وَرُسُلِي هُزُوًا
t: Thalika jazaohum jahannamu bima kafaroo waittakhathoo ayatee warusulee huzuwan
u: Unki jaza jahannum hai us kufr ke badle jo unhon ne kiya aur us mazaaq ki padash mein jo woh meri aayat aur mere Rasoolon ke saath karte rahey

ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ كَانَتۡ لَهُمۡ جَنَّٰتُ ٱلۡفِرۡدَوۡسِ نُزُلًا
t: Inna allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati kanat lahum jannatu alfirdawsi nuzulan
u: Albattta woh log jo iman laye aur jinhon ne neik amal kiya, unki mezbani ke liye firdous ke baagh hongey

ar: خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا لَا يَبۡغُونَ عَنۡهَا حِوَلࣰ ا
t: Khalideena feeha la yabghoona AAanha hiwalan
u: Jin mein woh hamesha rahenge aur kabhi us jagah se nikal kar kahin janey ko unka jee na chahega

ar: قُل لَّوۡ كَانَ ٱلۡبَحۡرُ مِدَادࣰ ا لِّكَلِمَٰتِ رَبِّي لَنَفِدَ ٱلۡبَحۡرُ قَبۡلَ أَن تَنفَدَ كَلِمَٰتُ رَبِّي وَلَوۡ جِئۡنَا بِمِثۡلِهِۦ مَدَدࣰ ا
t: Qul law kana albahru midadan likalimati rabbee lanafida albahru qabla an tanfada kalimatu rabbee walaw jina bimithlihi madadan
u: (Aey Muhammad), kaho ke agar samandar mere Rubb ki baatein likhne ke liye roshnayi(ink) ban jaye to woh khatam ho jaye magar mere Rubb ki baatein khatam na hon, balke itni hi roshnayi aur le aayein to woh bhi kifayat na karey

ar: قُلۡ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ بَشَرࣱ مِّثۡلُكُمۡ يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَيَّ أَنَّمَآ إِلَٰهُكُمۡ إِلَٰهࣱ وَٰحِدࣱۖ فَمَن كَانَ يَرۡجُواْ لِقَآءَ رَبِّهِۦ فَلۡيَعۡمَلۡ عَمَلࣰ ا صَٰلِحࣰ ا وَلَا يُشۡرِكۡ بِعِبَادَةِ رَبِّهِۦٓ أَحَدَۢا
t: Qul innama ana basharun mithlukum yooha ilayya annama ilahukum ilahun wahidun faman kana yarjoo liqaa rabbihi falyaAAmal AAamalan salihan wala yushrik biAAibadati rabbihi ahadan
u: (Aey Muhammad), kaho ke main to ek Insaan hoon tum hi jaisa, meri taraf wahee ki jaati hai ke tumhara khuda bas ek hi khuda hai, pas jo koi apne Rubb ki mulaqaat ka umeedwar ho usey chahiye ke neik amal karey aur bandagi mein apne Rubb ke saath kisi aur ko shareek na karey

ar: كٓهيعٓصٓ
t: KafhayaAAaynsad
u: Kaaf , Haa , yaa, ain , saad

ar: ذِكۡرُ رَحۡمَتِ رَبِّكَ عَبۡدَهُۥ زَكَرِيَّآ
t: Thikru rahmati rabbika AAabdahu zakariyya
u: Zikr hai us rehmat ka jo tere Rubb ne apne banday zakariya par ki thi

ar: إِذۡ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥ نِدَآءً خَفِيࣰّ ا
t: Ith nada rabbahu nidaan khafiyyan
u: Jabke usne apne Rubb ko chupke chupke pukara

ar: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّي وَهَنَ ٱلۡعَظۡمُ مِنِّي وَٱشۡتَعَلَ ٱلرَّأۡسُ شَيۡبࣰ ا وَلَمۡ أَكُنۢ بِدُعَآئِكَ رَبِّ شَقِيࣰّ ا
t: Qala rabbi innee wahana alAAathmu minnee waishtaAAala alrrasu shayban walam akun biduAAaika rabbi shaqiyyan
u: Usne arz kiya “aey parwardigar, meri haddiyan tak ghul gayi hain aur sar budhape se bhadak utha hai, aey parwardigar, main kabhi tujhse dua maang kar na-murad nahin raha

ar: وَإِنِّي خِفۡتُ ٱلۡمَوَٰلِيَ مِن وَرَآءِي وَكَانَتِ ٱمۡرَأَتِي عَاقِرࣰ ا فَهَبۡ لِي مِن لَّدُنكَ وَلِيࣰّ ا
t: Wainnee khiftu almawaliya min waraee wakanati imraatee AAaqiran fahab lee min ladunka waliyyan
u: Mujhey apne peechey apne bhai bandon ki buraiyon ka khauf hai, aur meri biwi baanjh (barren) hai, tu mujhey apne fazal e khaas se ek waris ata karde

ar: يَرِثُنِي وَيَرِثُ مِنۡ ءَالِ يَعۡقُوبَۖ وَٱجۡعَلۡهُ رَبِّ رَضِيࣰّ ا
t: Yarithunee wayarithu min ali yaAAqooba waijAAalhu rabbi radiyyan
u: Jo mera bhi ho aur aale yaqub ki miras bhi paye, aur aey parwardigar , usko ek pasandeeda Insaan bana”

ar: يَٰزَكَرِيَّآ إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلَٰمٍ ٱسۡمُهُۥ يَحۡيَىٰ لَمۡ نَجۡعَل لَّهُۥ مِن قَبۡلُ سَمِيࣰّ ا
t: Ya zakariyya inna nubashshiruka bighulamin ismuhu yahya lam najAAal lahu min qablu samiyyan
u: (Jawab diya gaya) “Aey zakariya, hum tujhe ek ladke ki basharat dete hain jiska naam Yahya hoga, humne is naam ka koi aadmi issey pehle paida nahin kiya”

ar: قَالَ رَبِّ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِي غُلَٰمࣱ وَكَانَتِ ٱمۡرَأَتِي عَاقِرࣰ ا وَقَدۡ بَلَغۡتُ مِنَ ٱلۡكِبَرِ عِتِيࣰّ ا
t: Qala rabbi anna yakoonu lee ghulamun wakanati imraatee AAaqiran waqad balaghtu mina alkibari AAitiyyan
u: Arz kiya, “parwardigar, bhala mere haan kaise beta hoga jabke meri biwi baanjh (barren) hai aur main boodha hokar sookh chuka hoon?”

ar: قَالَ كَذَٰلِكَ قَالَ رَبُّكَ هُوَ عَلَيَّ هَيِّنࣱ وَقَدۡ خَلَقۡتُكَ مِن قَبۡلُ وَلَمۡ تَكُ شَيۡـࣰٔ ا
t: Qala kathalika qala rabbuka huwa AAalayya hayyinun waqad khalaqtuka min qablu walam taku shayan
u: Jawab mila “aisa hi hoga. Tera Rubb farmata hai ke yeh to mere liye ek zara si baat hai, aakhir issey pehle main tujhey paida kar chuka hoon jabke tu koi cheez na tha”

ar: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱجۡعَل لِّيٓ ءَايَةࣰۖ قَالَ ءَايَتُكَ أَلَّا تُكَلِّمَ ٱلنَّاسَ ثَلَٰثَ لَيَالࣲ سَوِيࣰّ ا
t: Qala rabbi ijAAal lee ayatan qala ayatuka alla tukallima alnnasa thalatha layalin sawiyyan
u: Zakariya ne kaha, “parwardigar, mere liye koi nishani muqarrar karde”. Farmaya “tere liye nishani yeh hai ke tu paiham teen din logon se baat na kar sakey”

ar: فَخَرَجَ عَلَىٰ قَوۡمِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلۡمِحۡرَابِ فَأَوۡحَىٰٓ إِلَيۡهِمۡ أَن سَبِّحُواْ بُكۡرَةࣰ وَعَشِيࣰّ ا
t: Fakharaja AAala qawmihi mina almihrabi faawha ilayhim an sabbihoo bukratan waAAashiyyan
u: Chunachey woh mehrab se nikal kar apni qaum ke saamne aaya aur usne isharey se unko hidayat ki ke subh-o-shaam tasbeeh karo

ar: يَٰيَحۡيَىٰ خُذِ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ بِقُوَّةࣲۖ وَءَاتَيۡنَٰهُ ٱلۡحُكۡمَ صَبِيࣰّ ا
t: Ya yahya khuthi alkitaba biquwwatin waataynahu alhukma sabiyyan
u: Aey Yahya! Kitab e ilahi ko mazboot thaam le, humne usey bachpan hi mein “hukum” se nawaza

ar: وَحَنَانࣰ ا مِّن لَّدُنَّا وَزَكَوٰةࣰۖ وَكَانَ تَقِيࣰّ ا
t: Wahananan min ladunna wazakatan wakana taqiyyan
u: Aur apni taraf se usko narm dili aur paakeezgi ata ki aur woh bada parheizgaar

ar: وَبَرَّۢا بِوَٰلِدَيۡهِ وَلَمۡ يَكُن جَبَّارًا عَصِيࣰّ ا
t: Wabarran biwalidayhi walam yakun jabbaran AAasiyyan
u: Aur apne walidain ka haqq shanaas (dutiful ) tha, woh jabbar(arrogant) na tha aur na nafarman

ar: وَسَلَٰمٌ عَلَيۡهِ يَوۡمَ وُلِدَ وَيَوۡمَ يَمُوتُ وَيَوۡمَ يُبۡعَثُ حَيࣰّ ا
t: Wasalamun AAalayhi yawma wulida wayawma yamootu wayawma yubAAathu hayyan
u: Salaam uspar jis roz ke woh paida hua aur jis din marey aur jis roz woh zinda karke uthaya jaye

ar: وَٱذۡكُرۡ فِي ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ مَرۡيَمَ إِذِ ٱنتَبَذَتۡ مِنۡ أَهۡلِهَا مَكَانࣰ ا شَرۡقِيࣰّ ا
t: Waothkur fee alkitabi maryama ithi intabathat min ahliha makanan sharqiyyan
u: Aur (aey Muhammad), is kitaab mein Maryam ka haal bayan karo, jabke woh apne logon se alag ho kar sharqi (eastern side) janib gosha nasheen (in seclusion) ho gayi thi

ar: فَٱتَّخَذَتۡ مِن دُونِهِمۡ حِجَابࣰ ا فَأَرۡسَلۡنَآ إِلَيۡهَا رُوحَنَا فَتَمَثَّلَ لَهَا بَشَرࣰ ا سَوِيࣰّ ا
t: Faittakhathat min doonihim hijaban faarsalna ilayha roohana fatamaththala laha basharan sawiyyan
u: Aur purda daal kar unse chup (hidden) baithi thi is halat mein humne uske paas apni rooh ko (yani farishte ko) bheja aur woh uske saamne ek puray Insan ki shakal mein namudar ho gaya

ar: قَالَتۡ إِنِّيٓ أَعُوذُ بِٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ مِنكَ إِن كُنتَ تَقِيࣰّ ا
t: Qalat innee aAAoothu bialrrahmani minka in kunta taqiyyan
u: Maryam yakayak bol uthi ke “agar tu koi khuda tars aadmi hai to main tujhse rehman ki panaah maangti hoon”

ar: قَالَ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ رَسُولُ رَبِّكِ لِأَهَبَ لَكِ غُلَٰمࣰ ا زَكِيࣰّ ا
t: Qala innama ana rasoolu rabbiki liahaba laki ghulaman zakiyyan
u: Usne kaha “main to tere Rubb ka faristada hoon aur isliye bheja gaya hoon ke tujhey ek paakeeza ladka doon”

ar: قَالَتۡ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِي غُلَٰمࣱ وَلَمۡ يَمۡسَسۡنِي بَشَرࣱ وَلَمۡ أَكُ بَغِيࣰّ ا
t: Qalat anna yakoonu lee ghulamun walam yamsasnee basharun walam aku baghiyyan
u: Maryam ne kaha “ mere haan kaise ladka hoga jabke mujhey kisi bashar (Insaan) ne chua tak nahin hai aur main koi badhkaar aurat nahin hoon”

ar: قَالَ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ هُوَ عَلَيَّ هَيِّنࣱۖ وَلِنَجۡعَلَهُۥٓ ءَايَةࣰ لِّلنَّاسِ وَرَحۡمَةࣰ مِّنَّاۚ وَكَانَ أَمۡرࣰ ا مَّقۡضِيࣰّ ا
t: Qala kathaliki qala rabbuki huwa AAalayya hayyinun walinajAAalahu ayatan lilnnasi warahmatan minna wakana amran maqdiyyan
u: Farishte ne kaha “ aisa hi hoga, tera Rubb farmata hai ke aisa karna mere liye bahut aasaan hai aur hum yeh isliye karenge ke us ladke ko logon ke liye ek nishani banayein aur apni taraf se ek rehmat, aur yeh kaam hokar rehna hai”

ar: ۞فَحَمَلَتۡهُ فَٱنتَبَذَتۡ بِهِۦ مَكَانࣰ ا قَصِيࣰّ ا
t: Fahamalathu faintabathat bihi makanan qasiyyan
u: Mayam ko us bacchey ka hamal reh gaya aur woh is hamal ko liye huey ek door ke maqaam par chali gayi

ar: فَأَجَآءَهَا ٱلۡمَخَاضُ إِلَىٰ جِذۡعِ ٱلنَّخۡلَةِ قَالَتۡ يَٰلَيۡتَنِي مِتُّ قَبۡلَ هَٰذَا وَكُنتُ نَسۡيࣰ ا مَّنسِيࣰّ ا
t: Faajaaha almakhadu ila jithAAi alnnakhlati qalat ya laytanee mittu qabla hatha wakuntu nasyan mansiyyan
u: Phir zachgi (delivery) ki takleef ne usey ek khajoor ke darakht ke nichey pahucha diya. Woh kehne lagi “kaash main issey pehle hi marr jati aur mera naam o nishan na rehta”

ar: فَنَادَىٰهَا مِن تَحۡتِهَآ أَلَّا تَحۡزَنِي قَدۡ جَعَلَ رَبُّكِ تَحۡتَكِ سَرِيࣰّ ا
t: Fanadaha min tahtiha alla tahzanee qad jaAAala rabbuki tahtaki sariyyan
u: Farishtey ne paintey (at the foot of her bed) se usko pukar kar kaha “ghum na kar tere Rubb ne tere nichey ek chashma rawan kardiya hai

ar: وَهُزِّيٓ إِلَيۡكِ بِجِذۡعِ ٱلنَّخۡلَةِ تُسَٰقِطۡ عَلَيۡكِ رُطَبࣰ ا جَنِيࣰّ ا
t: Wahuzzee ilayki bijithAAi alnnakhlati tusaqit AAalayki rutaban janiyyan
u: Aur tu zara is darakht ke tanay (trunk) ko hila, tere upar tarr-o-taaza khajoorein tapak padengi

ar: فَكُلِي وَٱشۡرَبِي وَقَرِّي عَيۡنࣰ اۖ فَإِمَّا تَرَيِنَّ مِنَ ٱلۡبَشَرِ أَحَدࣰ ا فَقُولِيٓ إِنِّي نَذَرۡتُ لِلرَّحۡمَٰنِ صَوۡمࣰ ا فَلَنۡ أُكَلِّمَ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ إِنسِيࣰّ ا
t: Fakulee waishrabee waqarree AAaynan faimma tarayinna mina albashari ahadan faqoolee innee nathartu lilrrahmani sawman falan okallima alyawma insiyyan
u: Pas tu kha aur pee aur apni aankhein thandi kar phir agar koi aadmi tujhey nazar aaye to ussey kehde ke maine rehman ke liye roze ki nazar maani hai, isliye aaj main kisi se na bolungi”

ar: فَأَتَتۡ بِهِۦ قَوۡمَهَا تَحۡمِلُهُۥۖ قَالُواْ يَٰمَرۡيَمُ لَقَدۡ جِئۡتِ شَيۡـࣰٔ ا فَرِيࣰّ ا
t: Faatat bihi qawmaha tahmiluhu qaloo ya maryamu laqad jiti shayan fariyyan
u: Phir woh is bacchey ko liye huey apni qaum mein aayi. Log kehne lagey “aey Maryam, yeh tu nay bada paap kar daala

ar: يَٰٓأُخۡتَ هَٰرُونَ مَا كَانَ أَبُوكِ ٱمۡرَأَ سَوۡءࣲ وَمَا كَانَتۡ أُمُّكِ بَغِيࣰّ ا
t: Ya okhta haroona ma kana abooki imraa sawin wama kanat ommuki baghiyyan
u: Aey Haroon ki behan, na tera baap koi bura aadmi tha aur na teri Maa hi koi badhkar aurat thi”

ar: فَأَشَارَتۡ إِلَيۡهِۖ قَالُواْ كَيۡفَ نُكَلِّمُ مَن كَانَ فِي ٱلۡمَهۡدِ صَبِيࣰّ ا
t: Faasharat ilayhi qaloo kayfa nukallimu man kana fee almahdi sabiyyan
u: Maryam ne bacchey ki taraf ishara kardiya. Logon ne kaha “hum issey kya baat karein jo gehwarey (cradle) mein pada hua ek baccha hai?”

ar: قَالَ إِنِّي عَبۡدُ ٱللَّهِ ءَاتَىٰنِيَ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ وَجَعَلَنِي نَبِيࣰّ ا
t: Qala innee AAabdu Allahi ataniya alkitaba wajaAAalanee nabiyyan
u: Baccha bol utha “ main Allah ka banda hoon usne mujhey kitab di , aur Nabi banaya

ar: وَجَعَلَنِي مُبَارَكًا أَيۡنَ مَا كُنتُ وَأَوۡصَٰنِي بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱلزَّكَوٰةِ مَا دُمۡتُ حَيࣰّ ا
t: WajaAAalanee mubarakan ayna ma kuntu waawsanee bialssalati waalzzakati ma dumtu hayyan
u: Aur babarakat kiya jahan bhi main rahoon, aur namaz aur zakaat ki pabandi ka hukum diya jab tak main zinda rahoon

ar: وَبَرَّۢا بِوَٰلِدَتِي وَلَمۡ يَجۡعَلۡنِي جَبَّارࣰ ا شَقِيࣰّ ا
t: Wabarran biwalidatee walam yajAAalnee jabbaran shaqiyyan
u: Aur apni walida ka haqq ada karne wala banaya, aur mujhko jabbar (oppressive) aur shaqqi (hard-hearted) nahin banaya

ar: وَٱلسَّلَٰمُ عَلَيَّ يَوۡمَ وُلِدتُّ وَيَوۡمَ أَمُوتُ وَيَوۡمَ أُبۡعَثُ حَيࣰّ ا
t: Waalssalamu AAalayya yawma wulidtu wayawma amootu wayawma obAAathu hayyan
u: Salam hai mujhpar jabke main paida hua aur jabke main maroon(die) aur jabke zinda karke uthaya jaoon”

ar: ذَٰلِكَ عِيسَى ٱبۡنُ مَرۡيَمَۖ قَوۡلَ ٱلۡحَقِّ ٱلَّذِي فِيهِ يَمۡتَرُونَ
t: Thalika AAeesa ibnu maryama qawla alhaqqi allathee feehi yamtaroona
u: Yeh hai Isa ibn Maryam aur yeh hai uske barey mein woh sacchi baat jismein log shakk kar rahey hain

ar: مَا كَانَ لِلَّهِ أَن يَتَّخِذَ مِن وَلَدࣲۖ سُبۡحَٰنَهُۥٓۚ إِذَا قَضَىٰٓ أَمۡرࣰ ا فَإِنَّمَا يَقُولُ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
t: Ma kana lillahi an yattakhitha min waladin subhanahu itha qada amran fainnama yaqoolu lahu kun fayakoonu
u: Allah ka yeh kaam nahin hai ke woh kisi ko beta banaye. Woh paak zaat hai, woh jab kisi baat ka faisla karta hai to kehta hai ke hoja, aur bas woh ho jati hai

ar: وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ رَبِّي وَرَبُّكُمۡ فَٱعۡبُدُوهُۚ هَٰذَا صِرَٰطࣱ مُّسۡتَقِيمࣱ‏
t: Wainna Allaha rabbee warabbukum faoAAbudoohu hatha siratun mustaqeemun
u: (Aur Isa ne kaha tha ke)”Allah mera Rubb bhi hai aur tumhara Rubb bhi, pas tum usi ki bandagi karo, yahi seedhi raah hai”

ar: فَٱخۡتَلَفَ ٱلۡأَحۡزَابُ مِنۢ بَيۡنِهِمۡۖ فَوَيۡلࣱ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِن مَّشۡهَدِ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيمٍ
t: Faikhtalafa alahzabu min baynihim fawaylun lillatheena kafaroo min mashhadi yawmin AAatheemin
u: Magar phir mukhtalif giroh baham ikhtilaf karne lagey. So jin logon ne kufr kiya unke liye woh waqt badi tabahi ka hoga

ar: أَسۡمِعۡ بِهِمۡ وَأَبۡصِرۡ يَوۡمَ يَأۡتُونَنَا لَٰكِنِ ٱلظَّٰلِمُونَ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ فِي ضَلَٰلࣲ مُّبِينࣲ‏
t: AsmiAA bihim waabsir yawma yatoonana lakini alththalimoona alyawma fee dalalin mubeenin
u: Jabke woh ek bada din dekhenge, jab woh hamare saamne hazir hongey us roz to unke kaan bhi khoob sun rahey hongey aur unki aankhein bhi khoob dekhti hongi, magar aaj yeh zalim khuli gumraahi mein mubtila hain

ar: وَأَنذِرۡهُمۡ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡحَسۡرَةِ إِذۡ قُضِيَ ٱلۡأَمۡرُ وَهُمۡ فِي غَفۡلَةࣲ وَهُمۡ لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ
t: Waanthirhum yawma alhasrati ith qudiya alamru wahum fee ghaflatin wahum la yuminoona
u: (Aey Muhammad), is halat mein jabke yeh log gafil hain aur iman nahin la rahey hain, inhein us din se dara do jabke faisla kardiya jayega aur pachtawe ke siwa koi chara-e-kaar na hoga

ar: إِنَّا نَحۡنُ نَرِثُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَمَنۡ عَلَيۡهَا وَإِلَيۡنَا يُرۡجَعُونَ
t: Inna nahnu narithu alarda waman AAalayha wailayna yurjaAAoona
u: Aakhir-e-kaar hum hi zameen aur uski sari cheezon ke waris hongey aur sab hamari taraf hi paltaye jayenge

ar: وَٱذۡكُرۡ فِي ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صِدِّيقࣰ ا نَّبِيًّا
t: Waothkur fee alkitabi ibraheema innahu kana siddeeqan nabiyyan
u: Aur is kitaab mein Ibrahim ka qissa bayan karo, beshak woh ek raast-baaz Insaan aur ek Nabi tha

ar: إِذۡ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ يَٰٓأَبَتِ لِمَ تَعۡبُدُ مَا لَا يَسۡمَعُ وَلَا يُبۡصِرُ وَلَا يُغۡنِي عَنكَ شَيۡـࣰٔ ا
t: Ith qala liabeehi ya abati lima taAAbudu ma la yasmaAAu wala yubsiru wala yughnee AAanka shayan
u: (Inhein zara us mauqe ki yaad dilao) jabke usne apne baap se kaha ke “Abbajaan, aap kyun un cheezon ki ibadat karte hain jo na sunti hain na dekhti hain aur na aap ka koi kaam bana sakti hain

ar: يَٰٓأَبَتِ إِنِّي قَدۡ جَآءَنِي مِنَ ٱلۡعِلۡمِ مَا لَمۡ يَأۡتِكَ فَٱتَّبِعۡنِيٓ أَهۡدِكَ صِرَٰطࣰ ا سَوِيࣰّ ا
t: Ya abati innee qad jaanee mina alAAilmi ma lam yatika faittabiAAnee ahdika siratan sawiyyan
u: Abbajaan, mere paas ek aisa ilam aaya hai jo aapke paas nahin aaya, aap mere peechey chalein , main aapko seedha raasta bataunga

ar: يَٰٓأَبَتِ لَا تَعۡبُدِ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنَۖ إِنَّ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنَ كَانَ لِلرَّحۡمَٰنِ عَصِيࣰّ ا
t: Ya abati la taAAbudi alshshaytana inna alshshaytana kana lilrrahmani AAasiyyan
u: Abbajaan!aap shaytan ki bandagi na karein, shaytan to rehman ka nafarman hai

ar: يَٰٓأَبَتِ إِنِّيٓ أَخَافُ أَن يَمَسَّكَ عَذَابࣱ مِّنَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ فَتَكُونَ لِلشَّيۡطَٰنِ وَلِيࣰّ ا
t: Ya abati innee akhafu an yamassaka AAathabun mina alrrahmani fatakoona lilshshyatani waliyyan
u: Abbajaan, mujhey darr hai ke kahin aap rehman ke azaab mein mubtila na ho jayein aur shaytan ke saathi ban kar rahein”

ar: قَالَ أَرَاغِبٌ أَنتَ عَنۡ ءَالِهَتِي يَٰٓإِبۡرَٰهِيمُۖ لَئِن لَّمۡ تَنتَهِ لَأَرۡجُمَنَّكَۖ وَٱهۡجُرۡنِي مَلِيࣰّ ا
t: Qala araghibun anta AAan alihatee ya ibraheemu lain lam tantahi laarjumannaka waohjurnee maliyyan
u: Baap ne kaha “Ibrahim, kya tu mere maboodon se phir gaya hai? Agar tu baaz na aaya to main tujhey sangsar(stone you to death) kardunga. Bas tu hamesha ke liye mujhse alag ho jaa”

ar: قَالَ سَلَٰمٌ عَلَيۡكَۖ سَأَسۡتَغۡفِرُ لَكَ رَبِّيٓۖ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ بِي حَفِيࣰّ ا
t: Qala salamun AAalayka saastaghfiru laka rabbee innahu kana bee hafiyyan
u: Ibrahim ne kaha “Salaam hai aapko, main apne Rubb se dua karoonga ke aapko maaf karde. Mera Rubb mujhpar bada hi meharban hai

ar: وَأَعۡتَزِلُكُمۡ وَمَا تَدۡعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَأَدۡعُواْ رَبِّي عَسَىٰٓ أَلَّآ أَكُونَ بِدُعَآءِ رَبِّي شَقِيࣰّ ا
t: WaaAAtazilukum wama tadAAoona min dooni Allahi waadAAoo rabbee AAasa alla akoona biduAAai rabbee shaqiyyan
u: Main aap logon ko bhi chodhta hoon aur un hastiyon ko bhi jinhein aap log khuda ko chodh kar pukara karte hain. Main to apne Rubb hi ko pukarunga , umeed hai ke main apne Rubb ko pukar ke na-murad na rahunga”

ar: فَلَمَّا ٱعۡتَزَلَهُمۡ وَمَا يَعۡبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَهَبۡنَا لَهُۥٓ إِسۡحَٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوبَۖ وَكُلࣰّ ا جَعَلۡنَا نَبِيࣰّ ا
t: Falamma iAAtazalahum wama yaAAbudoona min dooni Allahi wahabna lahu ishaqa wayaAAqooba wakullan jaAAalna nabiyyan
u: Pas jab woh un logon se aur unke maboodane gair Allah se juda ho gaya to humne usko Ishaaq aur Yakub jaisi aulad di aur har ek ko Nabi banaya

ar: وَوَهَبۡنَا لَهُم مِّن رَّحۡمَتِنَا وَجَعَلۡنَا لَهُمۡ لِسَانَ صِدۡقٍ عَلِيࣰّ ا
t: Wawahabna lahum min rahmatina wajaAAalna lahum lisana sidqin AAaliyyan
u: Aur unko apni rehmat se nawaza aur unko sacchi naamwari ata ki

ar: وَٱذۡكُرۡ فِي ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ مُوسَىٰٓۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مُخۡلَصࣰ ا وَكَانَ رَسُولࣰ ا نَّبِيࣰّ ا
t: Waothkur fee alkitabi moosa innahu kana mukhlasan wakana rasoolan nabiyyan
u: Aur zikr karo is kitaab mein Moosa ka, woh ek cheeda (chosen) shaks tha aur Rasool Nabi tha

ar: وَنَٰدَيۡنَٰهُ مِن جَانِبِ ٱلطُّورِ ٱلۡأَيۡمَنِ وَقَرَّبۡنَٰهُ نَجِيࣰّ ا
t: Wanadaynahu min janibi alttoori alaymani waqarrabnahu najiyyan
u: Humne usko Tur ke dahini(right) janib se pukara aur raaz ki guftagu se usko takarrub (honour) ata kiya

ar: وَوَهَبۡنَا لَهُۥ مِن رَّحۡمَتِنَآ أَخَاهُ هَٰرُونَ نَبِيࣰّ ا
t: Wawahabna lahu min rahmatina akhahu haroona nabiyyan
u: Aur apni mehrabani se uske bhai Haroon ko Nabi bana kar usey (madadgaar ke taur par) diya

ar: وَٱذۡكُرۡ فِي ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ إِسۡمَٰعِيلَۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صَادِقَ ٱلۡوَعۡدِ وَكَانَ رَسُولࣰ ا نَّبِيࣰّ ا
t: Waothkur fee alkitabi ismaAAeela innahu kana sadiqa alwaAAdi wakana rasoolan nabiyyan
u: Aur is kitaab mein Ismail ka zir karo, woh wadey ka saccha tha aur Rasool Nabi tha

ar: وَكَانَ يَأۡمُرُ أَهۡلَهُۥ بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱلزَّكَوٰةِ وَكَانَ عِندَ رَبِّهِۦ مَرۡضِيࣰّ ا
t: Wakana yamuru ahlahu bialssalati waalzzakati wakana AAinda rabbihi mardiyyan
u: Woh apne ghar walon ko namaz aur zakat ka hukum deta tha aur apne Rubb ke nazdeek ek pasandeeda Insaan tha

ar: وَٱذۡكُرۡ فِي ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ إِدۡرِيسَۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صِدِّيقࣰ ا نَّبِيࣰّ ا
t: Waothkur fee alkitabi idreesa innahu kana siddeeqan nabiyyan
u: Aur is kitaab mein Idris ka zikr karo, woh ek raast-baaz (righteous) Insaan aur ek Nabi tha

ar: وَرَفَعۡنَٰهُ مَكَانًا عَلِيًّا
t: WarafaAAnahu makanan AAaliyyan
u: Aur usey humne buland muqaam par uthaya tha

ar: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنۡعَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيۡهِم مِّنَ ٱلنَّبِيِّـۧنَ مِن ذُرِّيَّةِ ءَادَمَ وَمِمَّنۡ حَمَلۡنَا مَعَ نُوحࣲ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّةِ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسۡرَٰٓءِيلَ وَمِمَّنۡ هَدَيۡنَا وَٱجۡتَبَيۡنَآۚ إِذَا تُتۡلَىٰ عَلَيۡهِمۡ ءَايَٰتُ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ خَرُّواْۤ سُجَّدࣰ اۤ وَبُكِيࣰّ ا۩
t: Olaika allatheena anAAama Allahu AAalayhim mina alnnabiyyeena min thurriyyati adama wamimman hamalna maAAa noohin wamin thurriyyati ibraheema waisraeela wamimman hadayna waijtabayna itha tutla AAalayhim ayatu alrrahmani kharroo sujjadan wabukiyyan
u: Yeh woh paigambar hain jinpar Allah ne inaam farmaya Adam ki aulad mein se, aur un logon ki nasal se jinhein humne Nooh ke saath kashti par sawaar kiya tha, aur Ibrahim ki nasal se aur Israel ki nasal se aur yeh un logon mein se thay jinko humne hidayat bakshi aur barguzida kiya.Inka haal yeh tha ke jab rehman ki aayat unko sunayi jati to rotey huey sajde mein gir jatey thay

ar: ۞فَخَلَفَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِمۡ خَلۡفٌ أَضَاعُواْ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَٱتَّبَعُواْ ٱلشَّهَوَٰتِۖ فَسَوۡفَ يَلۡقَوۡنَ غَيًّا
t: Fakhalafa min baAAdihim khalfun adaAAoo alssalata waittabaAAoo alshshahawati fasawfa yalqawna ghayyan
u: Phir inke baad woh nakhalf (degenerate) log inke jaansaheen (sucessors) huey jinhon ne namaz ko zaya kiya aur khwahishat e nafs ki pairwi ki. Pas qareeb hai ke woh gumraahi ke anjaam se do-char hon

ar: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحࣰ ا فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ يَدۡخُلُونَ ٱلۡجَنَّةَ وَلَا يُظۡلَمُونَ شَيۡـࣰٔ ا
t: Illa man taba waamana waAAamila salihan faolaika yadkhuloona aljannata wala yuthlamoona shayan
u: Albatta jo tawba karlein aur iman le aayein aur neik amali ikhtiyar karlein woh jannat mein dakhil hongey aur unki zarra barabar haqq talafi na hogi

ar: جَنَّٰتِ عَدۡنٍ ٱلَّتِي وَعَدَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ عِبَادَهُۥ بِٱلۡغَيۡبِۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ وَعۡدُهُۥ مَأۡتِيࣰّ ا
t: Jannati AAadnin allatee waAAada alrrahmanu AAibadahu bialghaybi innahu kana waAAduhu matiyyan
u: Inke liye hamesha rehne wali jannatein hain jinka rehman ne apne bandon se dar-purda wada kar rakkha hai aur yaqeenan yeh wada poora hokar rehna hai

ar: لَّا يَسۡمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغۡوًا إِلَّا سَلَٰمࣰ اۖ وَلَهُمۡ رِزۡقُهُمۡ فِيهَا بُكۡرَةࣰ وَعَشِيࣰّ ا
t: La yasmaAAoona feeha laghwan illa salaman walahum rizquhum feeha bukratan waAAashiyyan
u: Wahan woh koi behuda baat na sunenge , jo kuch bhi sunenge theek hi sunenge aur unka rizq unhein paiham subh-o-shaam milta rahega

ar: تِلۡكَ ٱلۡجَنَّةُ ٱلَّتِي نُورِثُ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا مَن كَانَ تَقِيࣰّ ا
t: Tilka aljannatu allatee noorithu min AAibadina man kana taqiyyan
u: Yeh hai woh jannat jiska waris hum apne bandon mein se usko banayenge jo parheizgaar raha hai

ar: وَمَا نَتَنَزَّلُ إِلَّا بِأَمۡرِ رَبِّكَۖ لَهُۥ مَا بَيۡنَ أَيۡدِينَا وَمَا خَلۡفَنَا وَمَا بَيۡنَ ذَٰلِكَۚ وَمَا كَانَ رَبُّكَ نَسِيࣰّ ا
t: Wama natanazzalu illa biamri rabbika lahu ma bayna aydeena wama khalfana wama bayna thalika wama kana rabbuka nasiyyan
u: (Aey Muhammad), hum tumhare Rubb ke hukum ke bagair nahin utra karte, jo kuch hamare aage hai aur jo kuch peechey hai aur jo kuch iske darmiyan mein hai har cheez ka maalik wahi hai aur tumhara Rubb bhoolne wala nahin hai

ar: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا فَٱعۡبُدۡهُ وَٱصۡطَبِرۡ لِعِبَٰدَتِهِۦۚ هَلۡ تَعۡلَمُ لَهُۥ سَمِيࣰّ ا
t: Rabbu alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma faoAAbudhu waistabir liAAibadatihi hal taAAlamu lahu samiyyan
u: Woh Rubb hai aasmano ka aur zameen ka aur un saari cheezon ka jo aasman o zameen ke darmiyan hain, pas tum uski bandagi karo aur usi ki bangadi par sabit qadam raho. Kya hai koi hasti tumhare ilm mein iski hum paya (equal in rank to him)

ar: وَيَقُولُ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ أَءِذَا مَا مِتُّ لَسَوۡفَ أُخۡرَجُ حَيًّا
t: Wayaqoolu alinsanu aitha ma mittu lasawfa okhraju hayyan
u: Insaan kehta hai kya waqai jab main mar chukunga to phir zinda karke nikal laya jaunga

ar: أَوَلَا يَذۡكُرُ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقۡنَٰهُ مِن قَبۡلُ وَلَمۡ يَكُ شَيۡـࣰٔ ا
t: Awala yathkuru alinsanu anna khalaqnahu min qablu walam yaku shayan
u: Kya Insaan ko yaad nahin aata ke hum pehle usko paida kar chuke hain jabke woh kuch bhi na tha

ar: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَحۡشُرَنَّهُمۡ وَٱلشَّيَٰطِينَ ثُمَّ لَنُحۡضِرَنَّهُمۡ حَوۡلَ جَهَنَّمَ جِثِيࣰّ ا
t: Fawarabbika lanahshurannahum waalshshayateena thumma lanuhdirannahum hawla jahannama jithiyyan
u: Tere Rubb ki kasam , hum zaroor un sab ko aur unke saath shayateen ko bhi gher layenge, phir jahannum ke gird laa kar inhein ghutno (knees) ke bal gira denge

ar: ثُمَّ لَنَنزِعَنَّ مِن كُلِّ شِيعَةٍ أَيُّهُمۡ أَشَدُّ عَلَى ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ عِتِيࣰّ ا
t: Thumma lananziAAanna min kulli sheeAAatin ayyuhum ashaddu AAala alrrahmani AAitiyyan
u: Phir har giroh mein se har us shaks ko chaant lenge (pick out) jo rehman ke muqable mein zyada sarkash bana hua tha

ar: ثُمَّ لَنَحۡنُ أَعۡلَمُ بِٱلَّذِينَ هُمۡ أَوۡلَىٰ بِهَا صِلِيࣰّ ا
t: Thumma lanahnu aAAlamu biallatheena hum awla biha siliyyan
u: Phir hum yeh jaante hain ke in mein se kaun sabse badhkar jahannum mein jhonke janey ka mustahiq hai

ar: وَإِن مِّنكُمۡ إِلَّا وَارِدُهَاۚ كَانَ عَلَىٰ رَبِّكَ حَتۡمࣰ ا مَّقۡضِيࣰّ ا
t: Wain minkum illa wariduha kana AAala rabbika hatman maqdiyyan
u: Tum mein se koi nahin hai jo jahannum par warid na ho,yeh to ek tai shuda baat hai jisey pura karna tere Rubb ka zimma hai

ar: ثُمَّ نُنَجِّي ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَواْ وَّنَذَرُ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ فِيهَا جِثِيࣰّ ا
t: Thumma nunajjee allatheena ittaqaw wanatharu alththalimeena feeha jithiyyan
u: Phir hum un logon ko bacha lenge jo (duniya mein ) muttaqi thay aur zalimon ko usi mein gira hua chodh denge

ar: وَإِذَا تُتۡلَىٰ عَلَيۡهِمۡ ءَايَٰتُنَا بَيِّنَٰتࣲ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ أَيُّ ٱلۡفَرِيقَيۡنِ خَيۡرࣱ مَّقَامࣰ ا وَأَحۡسَنُ نَدِيࣰّ ا
t: Waitha tutla AAalayhim ayatuna bayyinatin qala allatheena kafaroo lillatheena amanoo ayyu alfareeqayni khayrun maqaman waahsanu nadiyyan
u: In logon ko jab hamari khuli khuli aayat sunayi jati hain to inkar karne waley iman laney walon se kehte hain “batao, hum dono girohon mein se kaun behtar halat mein hai aur kiski majlisein zyada shandaar hai?”

ar: وَكَمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُم مِّن قَرۡنٍ هُمۡ أَحۡسَنُ أَثَٰثࣰ ا وَرِءۡيࣰ ا
t: Wakam ahlakna qablahum min qarnin hum ahsanu athathan wariyan
u: Halanke insey pehle hum kitni hi aisi qaumo ko halaak kar chuke hain jo insey zyada sar-o-samaan rakhti thin aur zahiri shaan o shaukat mein insey badi hui thi

ar: قُلۡ مَن كَانَ فِي ٱلضَّلَٰلَةِ فَلۡيَمۡدُدۡ لَهُ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ مَدًّاۚ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا رَأَوۡاْ مَا يُوعَدُونَ إِمَّا ٱلۡعَذَابَ وَإِمَّا ٱلسَّاعَةَ فَسَيَعۡلَمُونَ مَنۡ هُوَ شَرࣱّ مَّكَانࣰ ا وَأَضۡعَفُ جُندࣰ ا
t: Qul man kana fee alddalalati falyamdud lahu alrrahmanu maddan hatta itha raaw ma yooAAadoona imma alAAathaba waimma alssaAAata fasayaAAlamoona man huwa sharrun makanan waadAAafu jundan
u: Insey kaho, jo shaks gumraahi mein mubtila hota hai usey Rehman dheel diya karta hai, yahan tak ke jab aisey log woh cheez dekh letay hain jiska unse wada kiya gaya hai khwa woh azaab e ilahi ho ya qayamat ki ghadi tab unhein maloom ho jata hai ke kiska haal kharab hai aur kiska jattha (party) kamzor

ar: وَيَزِيدُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱهۡتَدَوۡاْ هُدࣰ ىۗ وَٱلۡبَٰقِيَٰتُ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتُ خَيۡرٌ عِندَ رَبِّكَ ثَوَابࣰ ا وَخَيۡرࣱ مَّرَدًّا
t: Wayazeedu Allahu allatheena ihtadaw hudan waalbaqiyatu alssalihatu khayrun AAinda rabbika thawaban wakhayrun maraddan
u: Iske baraks jo logo raah e raast ikhtiyar karte hain Allah unko raast-rawi mein taraqqi ata farmata hai aur baaqi reh janey wali nekiyan hi tere Rubb ke nazdeek jaza aur anjaam ke aitbaar se behtar hain

ar: أَفَرَءَيۡتَ ٱلَّذِي كَفَرَ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا وَقَالَ لَأُوتَيَنَّ مَالࣰ ا وَوَلَدًا
t: Afaraayta allathee kafara biayatina waqala laootayanna malan wawaladan
u: Phir tu nay dekha us shaks ko jo hamari aayat ko manney se inkar karta hai aur kehta hai ke main to maal aur aulad se nawaza hi jata rahunga

ar: أَطَّلَعَ ٱلۡغَيۡبَ أَمِ ٱتَّخَذَ عِندَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ عَهۡدࣰ ا
t: AttalaAAa alghayba ami ittakhatha AAinda alrrahmani AAahdan
u: Kya usey gaib ka pata chal gaya hai ya usne rehman se koi ahad le rakkha hai

ar: كَلَّاۚ سَنَكۡتُبُ مَا يَقُولُ وَنَمُدُّ لَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلۡعَذَابِ مَدࣰّ ا
t: Kalla sanaktubu ma yaqoolu wanamuddu lahu mina alAAathabi maddan
u: Hargiz nahin, jo kuch yeh bakhta (boasts of) hai isey hum likh lengey aur iske liye saza mein aur zyada izafa karenge

ar: وَنَرِثُهُۥ مَا يَقُولُ وَيَأۡتِينَا فَرۡدࣰ ا
t: Wanarithuhu ma yaqoolu wayateena fardan
u: Jis sar-o-samaan aur laao lashkar ka yeh zikr kar raha hai woh sab hamare paas reh jayega aur yeh akela hamare saamne hazir hoga

ar: وَٱتَّخَذُواْ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةࣰ لِّيَكُونُواْ لَهُمۡ عِزࣰّ ا
t: Waittakhathoo min dooni Allahi alihatan liyakoonoo lahum AAizzan
u: In logon ne Allah ko chodh kar apne kuch khuda bana rakkhey hain taa-ke woh inke pushtebaan (supporters) hon

ar: كَلَّاۚ سَيَكۡفُرُونَ بِعِبَادَتِهِمۡ وَيَكُونُونَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ ضِدًّا
t: Kalla sayakfuroona biAAibadatihim wayakoonoona AAalayhim diddan
u: Koi pushtebaan na hoga, woh sab inki ibadat ka inkar karenge aur ultey inke mukhalif ban jayenge

ar: أَلَمۡ تَرَ أَنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا ٱلشَّيَٰطِينَ عَلَى ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ تَؤُزُّهُمۡ أَزࣰّ ا
t: Alam tara anna arsalna alshshayateena AAala alkafireena taozzuhum azzan
u: Kya tum dekhte nahin ho ke humne in munkireen e haqq par shayateen chodh rakkhey hain jo inhein khoob khoob (mukhalifat e haqq par) uksa rahey hain

ar: فَلَا تَعۡجَلۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡۖ إِنَّمَا نَعُدُّ لَهُمۡ عَدࣰّ ا
t: Fala taAAjal AAalayhim innama naAAuddu lahum AAaddan
u: Accha, to ab inpar nuzul e azaab ke liye betaab na ho, hum inke din gin rahey hain

ar: يَوۡمَ نَحۡشُرُ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ إِلَى ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ وَفۡدࣰ ا
t: Yawma nahshuru almuttaqeena ila alrrahmani wafdan
u: Woh din aane wala hai jab muttaqi logon ko hum mehmaano ki tarah rehman ke huzur pesh karenge

ar: وَنَسُوقُ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ وِرۡدࣰ ا
t: Wanasooqu almujrimeena ila jahannama wirdan
u: Aur mujreemon ko pyase jaanwaron ki tarah jahannum ki taraf haank le jayenge

ar: لَّا يَمۡلِكُونَ ٱلشَّفَٰعَةَ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّخَذَ عِندَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ عَهۡدࣰ ا
t: La yamlikoona alshshafaAAata illa mani ittakhatha AAinda alrrahmani AAahdan
u: Us waqt log koi sifarish laney par qaadir na honge bajuz uske jisne Rehman ke huzur se parwana hasil karliya ho

ar: وَقَالُواْ ٱتَّخَذَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ وَلَدࣰ ا
t: Waqaloo ittakhatha alrrahmanu waladan
u: Woh kehte hain ke rehman ne kisi ko beta bana liya hai

ar: لَّقَدۡ جِئۡتُمۡ شَيۡـًٔا إِدࣰّ ا
t: Laqad jitum shayan iddan
u: Sakht behuda baat hai jo tum log ghadh laye ho

ar: تَكَادُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتُ يَتَفَطَّرۡنَ مِنۡهُ وَتَنشَقُّ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ وَتَخِرُّ ٱلۡجِبَالُ هَدًّا
t: Takadu alssamawatu yatafattarna minhu watanshaqqu alardu watakhirru aljibalu haddan
u: Qareeb hai ke aasmaan phatt padein, zameen shaqq ho jaye (split asunder) aur pahad gir jayein

ar: أَن دَعَوۡاْ لِلرَّحۡمَٰنِ وَلَدࣰ ا
t: An daAAaw lilrrahmani waladan
u: Is baat par ke logon ne Rehman ke liye aulad honay ka dawa kiya

ar: وَمَا يَنۢبَغِي لِلرَّحۡمَٰنِ أَن يَتَّخِذَ وَلَدًا
t: Wama yanbaghee lilrrahmani an yattakhitha waladan
u: Rehman ki yeh shaan nahin hai ke woh kisi ko beta banaye

ar: إِن كُلُّ مَن فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ إِلَّآ ءَاتِي ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ عَبۡدࣰ ا
t: In kullu man fee alssamawati waalardi illa atee alrrahmani AAabdan
u: Zameen aur aasmaano ke andar jo bhi hain sab uske huzoor bandon ki haisiyat se pesh honay waley hain

ar: لَّقَدۡ أَحۡصَىٰهُمۡ وَعَدَّهُمۡ عَدࣰّ ا
t: Laqad ahsahum waAAaddahum AAaddan
u: Sab par woh muheet (encircled) hai aur usne unko shumaar kar rakkha hai

ar: وَكُلُّهُمۡ ءَاتِيهِ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ فَرۡدًا
t: Wakulluhum ateehi yawma alqiyamati fardan
u: Sab qayamat ke roz fardan fardan (akele akele) uske saamne hazir hongey

ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ سَيَجۡعَلُ لَهُمُ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ وُدࣰّ ا
t: Inna allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati sayajAAalu lahumu alrrahmanu wuddan
u: Yaqeenan jo log iman le aaye hain aur amal e saleh kar rahey hain anqareeb Rehman unke liye dilon mein muhabbat paida kardega

ar: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرۡنَٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لِتُبَشِّرَ بِهِ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ وَتُنذِرَ بِهِۦ قَوۡمࣰ ا لُّدࣰّ ا
t: Fainnama yassarnahu bilisanika litubashshira bihi almuttaqeena watunthira bihi qawman luddan
u: Pas (aey Muhammad) , is kalam ko humne aasaan karke tumhari zubaan mein isi liye nazil kiya hai ke tum parheizgaron ko khush khabri dedo aur hat-dharm (jhagdalu/obdurate) logon ko dara do

ar: وَكَمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُم مِّن قَرۡنٍ هَلۡ تُحِسُّ مِنۡهُم مِّنۡ أَحَدٍ أَوۡ تَسۡمَعُ لَهُمۡ رِكۡزَۢا
t: Wakam ahlakna qablahum min qarnin hal tuhissu minhum min ahadin aw tasmaAAu lahum rikzan
u: Insey pehle hum kitni hi qaumon ko halaak kar chuke hain, phir aaj kahin tum unka nishaan patey ho, ya unki bhanak bhi kahin sunayi deti hai

ar: طه
t: Taha
u: Ta ha

ar: مَآ أَنزَلۡنَا عَلَيۡكَ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ لِتَشۡقَىٰٓ
t: Ma anzalna AAalayka alqurana litashqa
u: Humne yeh Quran tumpar is liye nazil nahin kiya hai ke tum museebat mein padh jao

ar: إِلَّا تَذۡكِرَةࣰ لِّمَن يَخۡشَىٰ
t: Illa tathkiratan liman yakhsha
u: Yeh to ek yaad dihani hai har us shaks ke liye jo darey

ar: تَنزِيلࣰ ا مِّمَّنۡ خَلَقَ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ ٱلۡعُلَى
t: Tanzeelan mimman khalaqa alarda waalssamawati alAAula
u: Nazil kiya gaya hai us zaat ki taraf se jisne paida kiya hai zameen ko aur buland aasmano ko

ar: ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ عَلَى ٱلۡعَرۡشِ ٱسۡتَوَىٰ
t: Alrrahmanu AAala alAAarshi istawa
u: Woh Rehman (qayanaat ke) takht e sultanat par jalwa farma hai

ar: لَهُۥ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا وَمَا تَحۡتَ ٱلثَّرَىٰ
t: Lahu ma fee alssamawati wama fee alardi wama baynahuma wama tahta alththara
u: Maalik hai un sab cheezon ka jo aasmano aur zameen mein hain aur jo zameen o aasmaan ke darmiyan mein hain aur jo mitti ke nichey hain

ar: وَإِن تَجۡهَرۡ بِٱلۡقَوۡلِ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَعۡلَمُ ٱلسِّرَّ وَأَخۡفَى
t: Wain tajhar bialqawli fainnahu yaAAlamu alssirra waakhfa
u: Tum chahe apni baat pukar kar kaho, woh to chupke se kahi hui baat balke issey makhfi-tar (most secret) baat bhi jaanta hai

ar: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَۖ لَهُ ٱلۡأَسۡمَآءُ ٱلۡحُسۡنَىٰ
t: Allahu la ilaha illa huwa lahu alasmao alhusna
u: Woh Allah hai, uske siwa koi khuda nahin, uske liye behtareen naam hain

ar: وَهَلۡ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ مُوسَىٰٓ
t: Wahal ataka hadeethu moosa
u: Aur tumhein kuch Moosa ki khabar bhi pahunchi hai

ar: إِذۡ رَءَا نَارࣰ ا فَقَالَ لِأَهۡلِهِ ٱمۡكُثُوٓاْ إِنِّيٓ ءَانَسۡتُ نَارࣰ ا لَّعَلِّيٓ ءَاتِيكُم مِّنۡهَا بِقَبَسٍ أَوۡ أَجِدُ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ هُدࣰ ى
t: Ith raa naran faqala liahlihi omkuthoo innee anastu naran laAAallee ateekum minha biqabasin aw ajidu AAala alnnari hudan
u: Jabke usne ek aag dekhi aur apne ghar walon se kaha ke “ zara thehro, maine ek aag dekhi hai, shayad ke tumhare liye ek-aad angara le aaon, ya is aag par mujhey (raaste ke mutaalik) koi rehnumayi (guidance) mil jaye”

ar: فَلَمَّآ أَتَىٰهَا نُودِيَ يَٰمُوسَىٰٓ
t: Falamma ataha noodiya ya moosa
u: Wahan pahuncha to pukara gaya “Aey Moosa

ar: إِنِّيٓ أَنَا۠ رَبُّكَ فَٱخۡلَعۡ نَعۡلَيۡكَ إِنَّكَ بِٱلۡوَادِ ٱلۡمُقَدَّسِ طُوࣰ ى
t: Innee ana rabbuka faikhlaAA naAAlayka innaka bialwadi almuqaddasi tuwan
u: Main hi tera Rubb hoon, jutiyan (shoes) utaar de, tu waadi e muqaddas Tuwa mein hai

ar: وَأَنَا ٱخۡتَرۡتُكَ فَٱسۡتَمِعۡ لِمَا يُوحَىٰٓ
t: Waana ikhtartuka faistamiAA lima yooha
u: Aur maine tujhko chun liya hai, sun jo kuch wahee kiya jata hai

ar: إِنَّنِيٓ أَنَا ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَٱعۡبُدۡنِي وَأَقِمِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ لِذِكۡرِيٓ
t: Innanee ana Allahu la ilaha illa ana faoAAbudnee waaqimi alssalata lithikree
u: Main hi Allah hoon, mere siwa koi khuda nahin hai, pas tu meri bandagi kar aur meri yaad ke liye namaz qayam kar

ar: إِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ ءَاتِيَةٌ أَكَادُ أُخۡفِيهَا لِتُجۡزَىٰ كُلُّ نَفۡسِۭ بِمَا تَسۡعَىٰ
t: Inna alssaAAata atiyatun akadu okhfeeha litujza kullu nafsin bima tasAAa
u: Qayamat ki ghadi zaroor aane wali hai, main uska waqt makhfi rakhna chahta hoon, taa-ke har mutanaffis apni saii(labours/koshish) ke mutabik badla paye

ar: فَلَا يَصُدَّنَّكَ عَنۡهَا مَن لَّا يُؤۡمِنُ بِهَا وَٱتَّبَعَ هَوَىٰهُ فَتَرۡدَىٰ
t: Fala yasuddannaka AAanha man la yuminu biha waittabaAAa hawahu fatarda
u: Pas koi aisa shaks jo uspar iman nahin laata aur apni khwahish e nafs ka banda ban gaya hai tujhko us ghadi ki fikr se na roak de, warna tu halakat mein padh jayega

ar: وَمَا تِلۡكَ بِيَمِينِكَ يَٰمُوسَىٰ
t: Wama tilka biyameenika ya moosa
u: Aur aey Moosa, yeh tere haath mein kya hai?”

ar: قَالَ هِيَ عَصَايَ أَتَوَكَّؤُاْ عَلَيۡهَا وَأَهُشُّ بِهَا عَلَىٰ غَنَمِي وَلِيَ فِيهَا مَـَٔارِبُ أُخۡرَىٰ
t: Qala hiya AAasaya atawakkao AAalayha waahushshu biha AAala ghanamee waliya feeha maaribu okhra
u: Moosa ne jawab diya “yeh meri laathi hai, ispar taik laga kar chalta hoon, issey apni bakriyon ke liye pattey jhadta hoon, aur bhi bahut se kaam hain jo issey leta hoon”

ar: قَالَ أَلۡقِهَا يَٰمُوسَىٰ
t: Qala alqiha ya moosa
u: Farmaya “phenk de isko Moosa”

ar: فَأَلۡقَىٰهَا فَإِذَا هِيَ حَيَّةࣱ تَسۡعَىٰ
t: Faalqaha faitha hiya hayyatun tasAAa
u: Usne phenk diya aur yakayak woh ek saanp (snake) thi jo daud raha tha

ar: قَالَ خُذۡهَا وَلَا تَخَفۡۖ سَنُعِيدُهَا سِيرَتَهَا ٱلۡأُولَىٰ
t: Qala khuthha wala takhaf sanuAAeeduha seerataha aloola
u: Farmaya “pakad le isko aur darr nahin, hum isey phir waisa hi kardenge jaisi yeh thi

ar: وَٱضۡمُمۡ يَدَكَ إِلَىٰ جَنَاحِكَ تَخۡرُجۡ بَيۡضَآءَ مِنۡ غَيۡرِ سُوٓءٍ ءَايَةً أُخۡرَىٰ
t: Waodmum yadaka ila janahika takhruj baydaa min ghayri sooin ayatan okhra
u: Aur zara apna haath apni bagal mein daba, chamakta hua niklega bagair kisi takleef ke, yeh dusri nishani hai

ar: لِنُرِيَكَ مِنۡ ءَايَٰتِنَا ٱلۡكُبۡرَى
t: Linuriyaka min ayatina alkubra
u: Is liye ke hum tujhey apni badi nishniyan dikane waley hain

ar: ٱذۡهَبۡ إِلَىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنَ إِنَّهُۥ طَغَىٰ
t: Ithhab ila firAAawna innahu tagha
u: Ab tu Firoun ke paas jaa, woh sarkash ho gaya hai”

ar: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱشۡرَحۡ لِي صَدۡرِي
t: Qala rabbi ishrah lee sadree
u: Moosa ne arz kiya “ parwardigar, mera seena khol de

ar: وَيَسِّرۡ لِيٓ أَمۡرِي
t: Wayassir lee amree
u: Aur mere kaam ko mere liye aasaan karde

ar: وَٱحۡلُلۡ عُقۡدَةࣰ مِّن لِّسَانِي
t: Waohlul AAuqdatan min lisanee
u: Aur meri zubaan ki girah suljha de

ar: يَفۡقَهُواْ قَوۡلِي
t: Yafqahoo qawlee
u: Taa-ke log meri baat samajh sakein

ar: وَٱجۡعَل لِّي وَزِيرࣰ ا مِّنۡ أَهۡلِي
t: WaijAAal lee wazeeran min ahlee
u: Aur mere liye mere apne kumbe (my own family) se ek wazir muqarrar karde

ar: هَٰرُونَ أَخِي
t: Haroona akhee
u: Haroon, jo mera bhai hai

ar: ٱشۡدُدۡ بِهِۦٓ أَزۡرِي
t: Oshdud bihi azree
u: Uske zariye se mera haath mazboot kar

ar: وَأَشۡرِكۡهُ فِيٓ أَمۡرِي
t: Waashrikhu fee amree
u: Aur usko mere kaam mein shareek karde

ar: كَيۡ نُسَبِّحَكَ كَثِيرࣰ ا
t: Kay nusabbihaka katheeran
u: Hum khoob teri paaki bayan karein

ar: وَنَذۡكُرَكَ كَثِيرًا
t: Wanathkuraka katheeran
u: Aur khoob tera charcha karein

ar: إِنَّكَ كُنتَ بِنَا بَصِيرࣰ ا
t: Innaka kunta bina baseeran
u: Tu hamesha hamare haal par nigraan raha hai”

ar: قَالَ قَدۡ أُوتِيتَ سُؤۡلَكَ يَٰمُوسَىٰ
t: Qala qad ooteeta sulaka ya moosa
u: Farmaya “ diya gaya jo tu nay maanga aey Moosa

ar: وَلَقَدۡ مَنَنَّا عَلَيۡكَ مَرَّةً أُخۡرَىٰٓ
t: Walaqad mananna AAalayka marratan okhra
u: Humne phir ek martaba tujhpar ehsan kiya

ar: إِذۡ أَوۡحَيۡنَآ إِلَىٰٓ أُمِّكَ مَا يُوحَىٰٓ
t: Ith awhayna ila ommika ma yooha
u: Yaad karo woh waqt jabke humne teri Maa ko ishara kiya, aisa ishara jo wahee ke zariye kiya jaata hai

ar: أَنِ ٱقۡذِفِيهِ فِي ٱلتَّابُوتِ فَٱقۡذِفِيهِ فِي ٱلۡيَمِّ فَلۡيُلۡقِهِ ٱلۡيَمُّ بِٱلسَّاحِلِ يَأۡخُذۡهُ عَدُوࣱّ لِّي وَعَدُوࣱّ لَّهُۥۚ وَأَلۡقَيۡتُ عَلَيۡكَ مَحَبَّةࣰ مِّنِّي وَلِتُصۡنَعَ عَلَىٰ عَيۡنِيٓ
t: Ani iqthifeehi fee alttabooti faiqthifeehi fee alyammi falyulqihi alyammu bialssahili yakhuthhu AAaduwwun lee waAAaduwwun lahu waalqaytu AAalayka mahabbatan minnee walitusnaAAa AAala AAaynee
u: Ke is bacchey ko sandook (box) mein rakh de aur sandook ko dariya mein chodh de, dariya isey saahil par phenk dega aur isey mera dushman aur is bacchey ka dushman utha lega. Maine apni taraf se tujhpar mohabbat taari kardi aur aisa intizam kiya ke tu meri nigrani mein paala jaye

ar: إِذۡ تَمۡشِيٓ أُخۡتُكَ فَتَقُولُ هَلۡ أَدُلُّكُمۡ عَلَىٰ مَن يَكۡفُلُهُۥۖ فَرَجَعۡنَٰكَ إِلَىٰٓ أُمِّكَ كَيۡ تَقَرَّ عَيۡنُهَا وَلَا تَحۡزَنَۚ وَقَتَلۡتَ نَفۡسࣰ ا فَنَجَّيۡنَٰكَ مِنَ ٱلۡغَمِّ وَفَتَنَّٰكَ فُتُونࣰ اۚ فَلَبِثۡتَ سِنِينَ فِيٓ أَهۡلِ مَدۡيَنَ ثُمَّ جِئۡتَ عَلَىٰ قَدَرࣲ يَٰمُوسَىٰ
t: Ith tamshee okhtuka fataqoolu hal adullukum AAala man yakfuluhu farajaAAnaka ila ommika kay taqarra AAaynuha wala tahzana waqatalta nafsan fanajjaynaka mina alghammi wafatannaka futoonan falabithta sineena fee ahli madyana thumma jita AAala qadarin ya moosa
u: Yaad kar jabke teri behan chal rahi thi, phir jaa kar kehti hai, “main tumhein uska pata doon jo is bacchey ki parwarish acchi tarah karey?” Is tarah humne tujhey phir teri Maa ke paas pahuncha diya taa-ke uski aankh thandi rahey aur woh ranjeeda na ho. Aur (yeh bhi yaad kar ke) tu nay ek shaks ko qatal kardiya tha, humne tujhey is phanday se nikala aur tujhey mukhtalif aazmaaishon se guzara aur tu Madiyan ke logon mein kai saal thehra raha. Phir ab theek apne waqt par tu aa gaya hai aey Moosa

ar: وَٱصۡطَنَعۡتُكَ لِنَفۡسِي
t: WaistanaAAtuka linafsee
u: Maine tujhey apne kaam ka bana liya hai

ar: ٱذۡهَبۡ أَنتَ وَأَخُوكَ بِـَٔايَٰتِي وَلَا تَنِيَا فِي ذِكۡرِي
t: Ithhab anta waakhooka biayatee wala taniya fee thikree
u: Ja, tu aur tera bhai meri nishaniyon ke saath, aur dekho tum meri yaad mein taqseer (susti /negligence) na karna

ar: ٱذۡهَبَآ إِلَىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنَ إِنَّهُۥ طَغَىٰ
t: Ithhaba ila firAAawna innahu tagha
u: Jao tum dono Firoun ke paas ke woh sarkash ho gaya hai

ar: فَقُولَا لَهُۥ قَوۡلࣰ ا لَّيِّنࣰ ا لَّعَلَّهُۥ يَتَذَكَّرُ أَوۡ يَخۡشَىٰ
t: Faqoola lahu qawlan layyinan laAAallahu yatathakkaru aw yakhsha
u: Ussey narmi ke saath baat karna, shayad ke woh naseehat qabool karey ya darr jaaye”

ar: قَالَا رَبَّنَآ إِنَّنَا نَخَافُ أَن يَفۡرُطَ عَلَيۡنَآ أَوۡ أَن يَطۡغَىٰ
t: Qala rabbana innana nakhafu an yafruta AAalayna aw an yatgha
u: Dono ne arz kiya “ parwardigar, humein andesha hai ke woh humpar zyadati karega ya pil padega(treat us cruelly)”

ar: قَالَ لَا تَخَافَآۖ إِنَّنِي مَعَكُمَآ أَسۡمَعُ وَأَرَىٰ
t: Qala la takhafa innanee maAAakuma asmaAAu waara
u: Farmaya” daro mat, main tumhare saath hoon, sab kuch sun raha hoon aur dekh raha hoon

ar: فَأۡتِيَاهُ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولَا رَبِّكَ فَأَرۡسِلۡ مَعَنَا بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَٰٓءِيلَ وَلَا تُعَذِّبۡهُمۡۖ قَدۡ جِئۡنَٰكَ بِـَٔايَةࣲ مِّن رَّبِّكَۖ وَٱلسَّلَٰمُ عَلَىٰ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلۡهُدَىٰٓ
t: Fatiyahu faqoola inna rasoola rabbika faarsil maAAana banee israeela wala tuAAaththibhum qad jinaka biayatin min rabbika waalssalamu AAala mani ittabaAAa alhuda
u: Jao uske paas aur kaho ke hum tere Rubb ke faristaade (messengers) hain, bani Israel ko hamare saath janey ke liye chodh de aur unko takleef na de. Hum tere paas tere Rubb ki nishani lekar aaye hain aur salamati hai uske liye jo raah-e-raast ki pairwi karey

ar: إِنَّا قَدۡ أُوحِيَ إِلَيۡنَآ أَنَّ ٱلۡعَذَابَ عَلَىٰ مَن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
t: Inna qad oohiya ilayna anna alAAathaba AAala man kaththaba watawalla
u: Humko wahee (revelation) se bataya gaya hai ke azaab hai uske liye jo jhutlaye aur mooh moadey.”

ar: قَالَ فَمَن رَّبُّكُمَا يَٰمُوسَىٰ
t: Qala faman rabbukuma ya moosa
u: Firoun ne kaha “accha, to phir tum dono ka Rubb kaun hai aey Moosa?”

ar: قَالَ رَبُّنَا ٱلَّذِيٓ أَعۡطَىٰ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ خَلۡقَهُۥ ثُمَّ هَدَىٰ
t: Qala rabbuna allathee aAAta kulla shayin khalqahu thumma hada
u: Moosa ne jawab diya “hamara Rubb woh hai jisne har cheez ko uski saakht bakshi(given distinctive form), phir usko raasta bataya”

ar: قَالَ فَمَا بَالُ ٱلۡقُرُونِ ٱلۡأُولَىٰ
t: Qala fama balu alqurooni aloola
u: Firoun bola “aur pehle jo nasalein (generations) guzar chuki hain unki phir kya halat thi?”

ar: قَالَ عِلۡمُهَا عِندَ رَبِّي فِي كِتَٰبࣲۖ لَّا يَضِلُّ رَبِّي وَلَا يَنسَى
t: Qala AAilmuha AAinda rabbee fee kitabin la yadillu rabbee wala yansa
u: Moosa ne kaha “uska ilam mere Rubb ke paas ek nawishte (record) mein mehfooz hai, mera Rub na chukta hai na bhoolta hai”

ar: ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ مَهۡدࣰ ا وَسَلَكَ لَكُمۡ فِيهَا سُبُلࣰ ا وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءࣰ فَأَخۡرَجۡنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزۡوَٰجࣰ ا مِّن نَّبَاتࣲ شَتَّىٰ
t: Allathee jaAAala lakumu alarda mahdan wasalaka lakum feeha subulan waanzala mina alssamai maan faakhrajna bihi azwajan min nabatin shatta
u: Wahi jisne tumhare liye zameen ka farsh bichaya, aur usmein tumhare chalne ko raaste banaye, aur upar se pani barsaya, phir uske zariye se mukhtalif aqsam ki paidawaar nikali

ar: كُلُواْ وَٱرۡعَوۡاْ أَنۡعَٰمَكُمۡۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتࣲ لِّأُوْلِي ٱلنُّهَىٰ
t: Kuloo wairAAaw anAAamakum inna fee thalika laayatin liolee alnnuha
u: Khao aur apne jaanwaron ko bhi charao, yaqeenan is mein bahut si nishaniyan hain aqal rakhne walon ke liye

ar: ۞مِنۡهَا خَلَقۡنَٰكُمۡ وَفِيهَا نُعِيدُكُمۡ وَمِنۡهَا نُخۡرِجُكُمۡ تَارَةً أُخۡرَىٰ
t: Minha khalaqnakum wafeeha nuAAeedukum waminha nukhrijukum taratan okhra
u: Isi zameen se humne tumko paida kiya hai, isi mein hum tumhein wapas le jayenge aur isi se tumko dobara nikalenge

ar: وَلَقَدۡ أَرَيۡنَٰهُ ءَايَٰتِنَا كُلَّهَا فَكَذَّبَ وَأَبَىٰ
t: Walaqad araynahu ayatina kullaha fakaththaba waaba
u: Humne Firoun ko apni sabhi nishaniyan dikayi magar woh jhutlaye chala gaya aur na maana

ar: قَالَ أَجِئۡتَنَا لِتُخۡرِجَنَا مِنۡ أَرۡضِنَا بِسِحۡرِكَ يَٰمُوسَىٰ
t: Qala ajitana litukhrijana min ardina bisihrika ya moosa
u: Kehne laga “aey Moosa, kya tu hamare paas is liye aaya hai ke apne jaadu ke zoar se humko hamare mulk se nikal bahar karey

ar: فَلَنَأۡتِيَنَّكَ بِسِحۡرࣲ مِّثۡلِهِۦ فَٱجۡعَلۡ بَيۡنَنَا وَبَيۡنَكَ مَوۡعِدࣰ ا لَّا نُخۡلِفُهُۥ نَحۡنُ وَلَآ أَنتَ مَكَانࣰ ا سُوࣰ ى
t: Falanatiyannaka bisihrin mithlihi faijAAal baynana wabaynaka mawAAidan la nukhlifuhu nahnu wala anta makanan suwan
u: Accha, hum bhi tere muqable mein waisa hi jaadu latey hain, tai karle kab aur kahan muqaabla karna hai, na hum is qarardaad se phirenge na tu Phiriyo , khule maidan mein saamne aaja”

ar: قَالَ مَوۡعِدُكُمۡ يَوۡمُ ٱلزِّينَةِ وَأَن يُحۡشَرَ ٱلنَّاسُ ضُحࣰ ى
t: Qala mawAAidukum yawmu alzzeenati waan yuhshara alnnasu duhan
u: Moosa ne kaha “jashn ka din tai hua, aur din chadhey log jama hon”

ar: فَتَوَلَّىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنُ فَجَمَعَ كَيۡدَهُۥ ثُمَّ أَتَىٰ
t: Fatawalla firAAawnu fajamaAAa kaydahu thumma ata
u: Firoun ne palat kar apne saare hathkande jama kiye aur muqaable mein aa gaya

ar: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰ وَيۡلَكُمۡ لَا تَفۡتَرُواْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبࣰ ا فَيُسۡحِتَكُم بِعَذَابࣲۖ وَقَدۡ خَابَ مَنِ ٱفۡتَرَىٰ
t: Qala lahum moosa waylakum la taftaroo AAala Allahi kathiban fayushitakum biAAathabin waqad khaba mani iftara
u: Moosa ne ( ain mauqe par giroh muqabil ko mukhatib karke) kaha “shamat ke maaron, na jhooti tohmatein (invent falsehood) baandho Allah par, warna woh ek sakht azaab se tumhara sattyanaas kardega, jhoot jisne bhi ghada woh na-murad hua”

ar: فَتَنَٰزَعُوٓاْ أَمۡرَهُم بَيۡنَهُمۡ وَأَسَرُّواْ ٱلنَّجۡوَىٰ
t: FatanazaAAoo amrahum baynahum waasarroo alnnajwa
u: Yeh sunkar unke darmiyan ikhtilaf e raai ho gaya aur woh chupke chupke baham mashwarey karne lagey

ar: قَالُوٓاْ إِنۡ هَٰذَٰنِ لَسَٰحِرَٰنِ يُرِيدَانِ أَن يُخۡرِجَاكُم مِّنۡ أَرۡضِكُم بِسِحۡرِهِمَا وَيَذۡهَبَا بِطَرِيقَتِكُمُ ٱلۡمُثۡلَىٰ
t: Qaloo in hathani lasahirani yureedani an yukhrijakum min ardikum bisihrihima wayathhaba bitareeqatikumu almuthla
u: Aakhir-e-kaar kuch logon ne kaha ke “yeh dono to mehaz jaadugar hain.Inka maqsad yeh hai ke apne jaadu ke zoar se tumko tumhari zameen se be-dakhal kardein aur tumhare misaali (ideal) tareeq-e-zindagi ka khatma kardein

ar: فَأَجۡمِعُواْ كَيۡدَكُمۡ ثُمَّ ٱئۡتُواْ صَفࣰّ اۚ وَقَدۡ أَفۡلَحَ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ مَنِ ٱسۡتَعۡلَىٰ
t: FaajmiAAoo kaydakum thumma itoo saffan waqad aflaha alyawma mani istaAAla
u: Apni saari tadberein aaj ikatthi karlo aur eka karke maidan mein aao. Bas yeh samajhlo ke aaj jo gaalib raha wahi jeet gaya.”

ar: قَالُواْ يَٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِمَّآ أَن تُلۡقِيَ وَإِمَّآ أَن نَّكُونَ أَوَّلَ مَنۡ أَلۡقَىٰ
t: Qaloo ya moosa imma an tulqiya waimma an nakoona awwala man alqa
u: Jaadugar bole “Moosa, tum phenkte ho ya pehle hum phenkein?”

ar: قَالَ بَلۡ أَلۡقُواْۖ فَإِذَا حِبَالُهُمۡ وَعِصِيُّهُمۡ يُخَيَّلُ إِلَيۡهِ مِن سِحۡرِهِمۡ أَنَّهَا تَسۡعَىٰ
t: Qala bal alqoo faitha hibaluhum waAAisiyyuhum yukhayyalu ilayhi min sihrihim annaha tasAAa
u: Moosa ne kaha “nahin, tumhi phenko” yakayak unki rassiyan aur unki laathiyan unke jaadu ke zoar se Moosa ko daudti hui mehsoos hone lagi

ar: فَأَوۡجَسَ فِي نَفۡسِهِۦ خِيفَةࣰ مُّوسَىٰ
t: Faawjasa fee nafsihi kheefatan moosa
u: Aur moosa apne dil mein darr gaya

ar: قُلۡنَا لَا تَخَفۡ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلۡأَعۡلَىٰ
t: Qulna la takhaf innaka anta alaAAla
u: Humne kaha “mat darr, tu hi galib rahega

ar: وَأَلۡقِ مَا فِي يَمِينِكَ تَلۡقَفۡ مَا صَنَعُوٓاْۖ إِنَّمَا صَنَعُواْ كَيۡدُ سَٰحِرࣲۖ وَلَا يُفۡلِحُ ٱلسَّاحِرُ حَيۡثُ أَتَىٰ
t: Waalqi ma fee yameenika talqaf ma sanaAAoo innama sanaAAoo kaydu sahirin wala yuflihu alssahiru haythu ata
u: Phenk jo kuch tere haath mein hai, abhi inki saari banawati cheezon ko ningle (swallow) jata hai, yeh jo kuch bana kar laye hain yeh to jaadugar ka fareb hai, aur jaadugar kabhi kamiyab nahin ho sakta, khwah kisi shaan se woh aaye”

ar: فَأُلۡقِيَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ سُجَّدࣰ ا قَالُوٓاْ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّ هَٰرُونَ وَمُوسَىٰ
t: Faolqiya alssaharatu sujjadan qaloo amanna birabbi haroona wamoosa
u: Aakhir ko yahi hua ke saarey jaadugar sajde mein gira diye gaye aur pukar utthey “ maan liya humne Haroon aur Moosa ke Rubb ko”

ar: قَالَ ءَامَنتُمۡ لَهُۥ قَبۡلَ أَنۡ ءَاذَنَ لَكُمۡۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكَبِيرُكُمُ ٱلَّذِي عَلَّمَكُمُ ٱلسِّحۡرَۖ فَلَأُقَطِّعَنَّ أَيۡدِيَكُمۡ وَأَرۡجُلَكُم مِّنۡ خِلَٰفࣲ وَلَأُصَلِّبَنَّكُمۡ فِي جُذُوعِ ٱلنَّخۡلِ وَلَتَعۡلَمُنَّ أَيُّنَآ أَشَدُّ عَذَابࣰ ا وَأَبۡقَىٰ
t: Qala amantum lahu qabla an athana lakum innahu lakabeerukumu allathee AAallamakumu alssihra falaoqattiAAanna aydiyakum waarjulakum min khilafin walaosallibannakum fee juthooAAi alnnakhli walataAAlamunna ayyuna ashaddu AAathaban waabqa
u: Firoun ne kaha “tum iman le aaye qabl iske ke main tumhein iski ijazat deta? Maloom ho gaya ke yeh tumhara guru hai jisne tumhein jaadugari sikhayi thi. Accha ab main tumhare haath paon mukhalif simton (alternate sides ) se katwata hoon aur khajoor ke tano(trunks) par tumko sooli deta hoon, phir tumhein pata chal jayega ke hum dono mein se kiska azaab zyada sakht aur dair pa hai” (yani main tumhein zyada sakht saza de sakta hoon ya Moosa)

ar: قَالُواْ لَن نُّؤۡثِرَكَ عَلَىٰ مَا جَآءَنَا مِنَ ٱلۡبَيِّنَٰتِ وَٱلَّذِي فَطَرَنَاۖ فَٱقۡضِ مَآ أَنتَ قَاضٍۖ إِنَّمَا تَقۡضِي هَٰذِهِ ٱلۡحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنۡيَآ
t: Qaloo lan nuthiraka AAala ma jaana mina albayyinati waallathee fatarana faiqdi ma anta qadin innama taqdee hathihi alhayata alddunya
u: Jaadugaron (magicians) ne jawab diya “qasam hai us zaat ki jisne humein paida kiya hai, yeh hargiz nahin ho sakta ke hum roshan nishaniyan samne aa janey ke baad bhi (sadaqat par) tujhey tarjeeh dein. Tu jo kuch karna chahey karle, tu zyada se zyada bas isi duniya ki zindagi ka faisla kar sakta hai

ar: إِنَّآ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّنَا لِيَغۡفِرَ لَنَا خَطَٰيَٰنَا وَمَآ أَكۡرَهۡتَنَا عَلَيۡهِ مِنَ ٱلسِّحۡرِۗ وَٱللَّهُ خَيۡرࣱ وَأَبۡقَىٰٓ
t: Inna amanna birabbina liyaghfira lana khatayana wama akrahtana AAalayhi mina alssihri waAllahu khayrun waabqa
u: Hum to apne Rubb par iman le aaye taa-ke woh hamari khatayein maaf karde, aur is jaadugari se jispar tu nay humein majboor kiya tha darguzar farmaye. Allah hi accha hai aur wahi baaqi rehne waala hai”

ar: إِنَّهُۥ مَن يَأۡتِ رَبَّهُۥ مُجۡرِمࣰ ا فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ جَهَنَّمَ لَا يَمُوتُ فِيهَا وَلَا يَحۡيَىٰ
t: Innahu man yati rabbahu mujriman fainna lahu jahannama la yamootu feeha wala yahya
u: Haqeeqat yeh hai ke jo mujrin bankar apne Rubb ke huzoor haazir hoga uske liye jahannum hai jismein woh na jiyega na marega

ar: وَمَن يَأۡتِهِۦ مُؤۡمِنࣰ ا قَدۡ عَمِلَ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ لَهُمُ ٱلدَّرَجَٰتُ ٱلۡعُلَىٰ
t: Waman yatihi muminan qad AAamila alssalihati faolaika lahumu alddarajatu alAAula
u: Aur jo uske huzoor momin ki haisiyat se haazir hoga, jisne neik amal kiye hongey, aisey sab logon ke liye buland darje hain

ar: جَنَّٰتُ عَدۡنࣲ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَاۚ وَذَٰلِكَ جَزَآءُ مَن تَزَكَّىٰ
t: Jannatu AAadnin tajree min tahtiha alanharu khalideena feeha wathalika jazao man tazakka
u: Sada bahaar baagh (gardens) hain jinke nichey nehrein beh rahi hongi Un mein woh hamesha rahenge.yeh jaza hai us shaks ki jo pakeezgi ikhtiyar karey

ar: وَلَقَدۡ أَوۡحَيۡنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنۡ أَسۡرِ بِعِبَادِي فَٱضۡرِبۡ لَهُمۡ طَرِيقࣰ ا فِي ٱلۡبَحۡرِ يَبَسࣰ ا لَّا تَخَٰفُ دَرَكࣰ ا وَلَا تَخۡشَىٰ
t: Walaqad awhayna ila moosa an asri biAAibadee faidrib lahum tareeqan fee albahri yabasan la takhafu darakan wala takhsha
u: Humne Moosa par wahee ki ke ab raat-o-raat mere bandon ko lekar chal padh, aur unke liye samandar mein sukhi sadak (dry path) bana le, tujhe kisi ke taaqub ka zara khauf na ho aur na (samandar ke beech se guzarte huey) darr lagey

ar: فَأَتۡبَعَهُمۡ فِرۡعَوۡنُ بِجُنُودِهِۦ فَغَشِيَهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡيَمِّ مَا غَشِيَهُمۡ
t: FaatbaAAahum firAAawnu bijunoodihi faghashiyahum mina alyammi ma ghashiyahum
u: Peechey se Frioun apne laskhar lekar pahucha aur phir samandar unpar chaa gaya jaisa ke chaa jaane ka haqq tha

ar: وَأَضَلَّ فِرۡعَوۡنُ قَوۡمَهُۥ وَمَا هَدَىٰ
t: Waadalla firAAawnu qawmahu wama hada
u: Firoun ne apni qaum ko gumraah hi kiya tha, koi saheeh rehnumayi nahin ki thi

ar: يَٰبَنِيٓ إِسۡرَٰٓءِيلَ قَدۡ أَنجَيۡنَٰكُم مِّنۡ عَدُوِّكُمۡ وَوَٰعَدۡنَٰكُمۡ جَانِبَ ٱلطُّورِ ٱلۡأَيۡمَنَ وَنَزَّلۡنَا عَلَيۡكُمُ ٱلۡمَنَّ وَٱلسَّلۡوَىٰ
t: Ya banee israeela qad anjaynakum min AAaduwwikum wawaAAadnakum janiba alttoori alaymana wanazzalna AAalaykumu almanna waalssalwa
u: Aey bani Israel, humne tumko tumhare dushman se najaat di, aur Tur ke dayein jaanib tumhari haazri ke liye waqt muqarrar kiya aur tumpar manna o salwa (quails) utara

ar: كُلُواْ مِن طَيِّبَٰتِ مَا رَزَقۡنَٰكُمۡ وَلَا تَطۡغَوۡاْ فِيهِ فَيَحِلَّ عَلَيۡكُمۡ غَضَبِيۖ وَمَن يَحۡلِلۡ عَلَيۡهِ غَضَبِي فَقَدۡ هَوَىٰ
t: Kuloo min tayyibati ma razaqnakum wala tatghaw feehi fayahilla AAalaykum ghadabee waman yahlil AAalayhi ghadabee faqad hawa
u: Khao hamara diya hua paak rizq aur isey kha kar sarkashi na karo warna tumpar mera gazab toot padega. Aur jispar mera gazab toota woh phir gir kar hi raha

ar: وَإِنِّي لَغَفَّارࣱ لِّمَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحࣰ ا ثُمَّ ٱهۡتَدَىٰ
t: Wainnee laghaffarun liman taba waamana waAAamila salihan thumma ihtada
u: Albatta jo tawba karle aur iman laye aur neik amal karey, phir seedha chalta rahey, uske liye main bahut darguzar karne wala hoon

ar: ۞وَمَآ أَعۡجَلَكَ عَن قَوۡمِكَ يَٰمُوسَىٰ
t: Wama aAAjalaka AAan qawmika ya moosa
u: Aur kya cheez tumhein apni qaum se pehle le aayi Moosa

ar: قَالَ هُمۡ أُوْلَآءِ عَلَىٰٓ أَثَرِي وَعَجِلۡتُ إِلَيۡكَ رَبِّ لِتَرۡضَىٰ
t: Qala hum olai AAala atharee waAAajiltu ilayka rabbi litarda
u: Usne arz kiya “woh bas mere peechey aa hi rahey hain. Main jaldi karke tere huzoor aa gaya hoon aey mere Rubb, taa-ke tu mujhse khush ho jaye”

ar: قَالَ فَإِنَّا قَدۡ فَتَنَّا قَوۡمَكَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِكَ وَأَضَلَّهُمُ ٱلسَّامِرِيُّ
t: Qala fainna qad fatanna qawmaka min baAAdika waadallahumu alssamiriyyu
u: Farmaya “accha, to suno, humne tumhare peechey tumhari qaum ko aazmaish mein daal diya aur Saamri ne unhein gumraah kar dala”

ar: فَرَجَعَ مُوسَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ قَوۡمِهِۦ غَضۡبَٰنَ أَسِفࣰ اۚ قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ أَلَمۡ يَعِدۡكُمۡ رَبُّكُمۡ وَعۡدًا حَسَنًاۚ أَفَطَالَ عَلَيۡكُمُ ٱلۡعَهۡدُ أَمۡ أَرَدتُّمۡ أَن يَحِلَّ عَلَيۡكُمۡ غَضَبࣱ مِّن رَّبِّكُمۡ فَأَخۡلَفۡتُم مَّوۡعِدِي
t: FarajaAAa moosa ila qawmihi ghadbana asifan qala ya qawmi alam yaAAidkum rabbukum waAAdan hasanan afatala AAalaykumu alAAahdu am aradtum an yahilla AAalaykum ghadabun min rabbikum faakhlaftum mawAAidee
u: Moosa sakht gussey aur ranjj ki halat mein apni qaum ki taraf palta. Jaakar usne kaha “aey meri qaum ke logon, kya tumhare Rubb ne tumse acchey wadey nahin kiye thay? Kya tumhein din lag gaye hain? Ya tum apne Rubb ka gazab hi apne upar lana chahte thay ke tumne mujhse wada khilafi ki?”

ar: قَالُواْ مَآ أَخۡلَفۡنَا مَوۡعِدَكَ بِمَلۡكِنَا وَلَٰكِنَّا حُمِّلۡنَآ أَوۡزَارࣰ ا مِّن زِينَةِ ٱلۡقَوۡمِ فَقَذَفۡنَٰهَا فَكَذَٰلِكَ أَلۡقَى ٱلسَّامِرِيُّ
t: Qaloo ma akhlafna mawAAidaka bimalkina walakinna hummilna awzaran min zeenati alqawmi faqathafnaha fakathalika alqa alssamiriyyu
u: Unhon ne jawab diya “humne aap se wada khilafi kuch apne ikhtiyar se nahin ki. Maamla yeh hua ke logon ke zewarat ke bojh se hum ladh gaye thay aur humne bas unko phenk diya tha” phir isi tarah Saamri ne bhi kuch dala

ar: فَأَخۡرَجَ لَهُمۡ عِجۡلࣰ ا جَسَدࣰ ا لَّهُۥ خُوَارࣱ فَقَالُواْ هَٰذَآ إِلَٰهُكُمۡ وَإِلَٰهُ مُوسَىٰ فَنَسِيَ
t: Faakhraja lahum AAijlan jasadan lahu khuwarun faqaloo hatha ilahukum wailahu moosa fanasiya
u: Aur unke liye ek bachde (shape of a calf) ki murat banakar nikal laya jissey bail (ox) ki si aawaz nikalti thi. Log pukar utthey “yahi hai tumhara khuda aur Moosa ka khuda, Moosa isey bhool gaya”

ar: أَفَلَا يَرَوۡنَ أَلَّا يَرۡجِعُ إِلَيۡهِمۡ قَوۡلࣰ ا وَلَا يَمۡلِكُ لَهُمۡ ضَرࣰّ ا وَلَا نَفۡعࣰ ا
t: Afala yarawna alla yarjiAAu ilayhim qawlan wala yamliku lahum darran wala nafAAan
u: Kya woh dekhte na thay ke na woh unki baat ka jawab deta hai aur na unke nafa o nuksan ka kuch ikhtiyar rakhta hai

ar: وَلَقَدۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ هَٰرُونُ مِن قَبۡلُ يَٰقَوۡمِ إِنَّمَا فُتِنتُم بِهِۦۖ وَإِنَّ رَبَّكُمُ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ فَٱتَّبِعُونِي وَأَطِيعُوٓاْ أَمۡرِي
t: Walaqad qala lahum haroonu min qablu ya qawmi innama futintum bihi wainna rabbakumu alrrahmanu faittabiAAoonee waateeAAoo amree
u: Haroon (Moosa ke aane se ) pehle hi unse keh chuka tha ke “Logon, tum iski wajah se fitne (trial) mein padh gaye ho, tumhara Rubb to Rehman hai, pas tum meri pairwi karo aur meri baat maano.”

ar: قَالُواْ لَن نَّبۡرَحَ عَلَيۡهِ عَٰكِفِينَ حَتَّىٰ يَرۡجِعَ إِلَيۡنَا مُوسَىٰ
t: Qaloo lan nabraha AAalayhi AAakifeena hatta yarjiAAa ilayna moosa
u: Unhon ne ussey kehdiya ke “hum isi ki parastish karte rahenge jab tak ke Moosa wapas na aa jaaye”

ar: قَالَ يَٰهَٰرُونُ مَا مَنَعَكَ إِذۡ رَأَيۡتَهُمۡ ضَلُّوٓاْ
t: Qala ya haroonu ma manaAAaka ith raaytahum dalloo
u: Moosa (qaum ko daatne ke baad Haroon ki taraf palta aur ) bola “ Haroon, tumne jab dekha tha ke yeh gumraah ho rahey hain

ar: أَلَّا تَتَّبِعَنِۖ أَفَعَصَيۡتَ أَمۡرِي
t: Alla tattabiAAani afaAAasayta amree
u: To kis cheez ne tumhara haath pakda tha ke mere tareeqe par amal na karo? Kya tumne mere hukum ki khilaf-warzi ki

ar: قَالَ يَبۡنَؤُمَّ لَا تَأۡخُذۡ بِلِحۡيَتِي وَلَا بِرَأۡسِيٓۖ إِنِّي خَشِيتُ أَن تَقُولَ فَرَّقۡتَ بَيۡنَ بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَٰٓءِيلَ وَلَمۡ تَرۡقُبۡ قَوۡلِي
t: Qala ya bna omma la takhuth bilihyatee wala birasee innee khasheetu an taqoola farraqta bayna banee israeela walam tarqub qawlee
u: Haroon ne jawab diya “ aey meri Maa ke bete , meri daadi (beard) na pakad, na mere sar ke baal khench, mujhey is baat ka darr tha ke tu aa kar kahega tumne bani Israel mein phoot daal di aur meri baat ka paas na kiya”

ar: قَالَ فَمَا خَطۡبُكَ يَٰسَٰمِرِيُّ
t: Qala fama khatbuka ya samiriyyu
u: Moosa ne kaha “Aur Saamri, tera kya maamla hai?”

ar: قَالَ بَصُرۡتُ بِمَا لَمۡ يَبۡصُرُواْ بِهِۦ فَقَبَضۡتُ قَبۡضَةࣰ مِّنۡ أَثَرِ ٱلرَّسُولِ فَنَبَذۡتُهَا وَكَذَٰلِكَ سَوَّلَتۡ لِي نَفۡسِي
t: Qala basurtu bima lam yabsuroo bihi faqabadtu qabdatan min athari alrrasooli fanabathtuha wakathalika sawwalat lee nafsee
u: Usne jawab diya “ maine woh cheez dekhi jo in logon ko nazar na aayi, pas maine Rasool ke nakshe qadam se ek mutthi utha li aur usko daal diya, mere nafs ne mujhey kuch aisa hi sujhaya”

ar: قَالَ فَٱذۡهَبۡ فَإِنَّ لَكَ فِي ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ أَن تَقُولَ لَا مِسَاسَۖ وَإِنَّ لَكَ مَوۡعِدࣰ ا لَّن تُخۡلَفَهُۥۖ وَٱنظُرۡ إِلَىٰٓ إِلَٰهِكَ ٱلَّذِي ظَلۡتَ عَلَيۡهِ عَاكِفࣰ اۖ لَّنُحَرِّقَنَّهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَنسِفَنَّهُۥ فِي ٱلۡيَمِّ نَسۡفًا
t: Qala faithhab fainna laka fee alhayati an taqoola la misasa wainna laka mawAAidan lan tukhlafahu waonthur ila ilahika allathee thalta AAalayhi AAakifan lanuharriqannahu thumma lanansifannahu fee alyammi nasfan
u: Moosa ne kaha, “accha to jaa, ab zindagi bhar tujhey yahi pukarte rehna hai ke mujhey na choona aur tere liye baaz-purs ka ek waqt muqarrar hai jo tujhse hargiz na taleyga aur dekh apne is khuda ko jispar tu richa (cherished so much) hua tha, ab hum usey jala daalenge aur reza reza karke dariya mein baha denge

ar: إِنَّمَآ إِلَٰهُكُمُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِي لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَۚ وَسِعَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ عِلۡمࣰ ا
t: Innama ilahukumu Allahu allathee la ilaha illa huwa wasiAAa kulla shayin AAilman
u: Logon, tumhara khuda to bas ek hi Allah hai jiske siwa koi aur khuda nahin hai, har cheez par uska ilm haawi hai”

ar: كَذَٰلِكَ نَقُصُّ عَلَيۡكَ مِنۡ أَنۢبَآءِ مَا قَدۡ سَبَقَۚ وَقَدۡ ءَاتَيۡنَٰكَ مِن لَّدُنَّا ذِكۡرࣰ ا
t: Kathalika naqussu AAalayka min anbai ma qad sabaqa waqad ataynaka min ladunna thikran
u: (Aey Muhammad), is tarah hum pichle guzre huey haalaat ki khabrein tumko sunate hain, aur humne khaas apne haan se tumko ek “zikr” (dars e naseehat) ata kiya hai

ar: مَّنۡ أَعۡرَضَ عَنۡهُ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَحۡمِلُ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ وِزۡرًا
t: Man aAArada AAanhu fainnahu yahmilu yawma alqiyamati wizran
u: Jo koi issey moah moadega woh qayamat ke din sakht baar e gunaah uthayega

ar: خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهِۖ وَسَآءَ لَهُمۡ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ حِمۡلࣰ ا
t: Khalideena feehi wasaa lahum yawma alqiyamati himlan
u: Aur aise sab log hamesha iske wabal mein giraftar rahenge, aur qayamat ke din unke liye (is jurm ki zimmedari ka bojh) bada takleef-de bojh hoga

ar: يَوۡمَ يُنفَخُ فِي ٱلصُّورِۚ وَنَحۡشُرُ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ زُرۡقࣰ ا
t: Yawma yunfakhu fee alssoori wanahshuru almujrimeena yawmaithin zurqan
u: Us din jabke soor (trumphet) phoonka jayega aur hum mujrimo ko is haal mein gher layenge ke unki aankhein (dehshat ke marey) pathrayi hui hongi

ar: يَتَخَٰفَتُونَ بَيۡنَهُمۡ إِن لَّبِثۡتُمۡ إِلَّا عَشۡرࣰ ا
t: Yatakhafatoona baynahum in labithtum illa AAashran
u: Aapas mein chupke chupke kahenge ke duniya mein mushkil hi se tumne koi dus(ten) din guzare honge

ar: نَّحۡنُ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ إِذۡ يَقُولُ أَمۡثَلُهُمۡ طَرِيقَةً إِن لَّبِثۡتُمۡ إِلَّا يَوۡمࣰ ا
t: Nahnu aAAlamu bima yaqooloona ith yaqoolu amthaluhum tareeqatan in labithtum illa yawman
u: Humein khoob maloom hai ke woh kya baatein kar rahey hongey, (hum yeh bhi jaante hain ke) us waqt unmein se jo zyada se zyada mohtaat andaza lagane wala hoga woh kahega ke nahin, tumhari duniya ki zindagi bas ek din ki zindagi thi

ar: وَيَسۡـَٔلُونَكَ عَنِ ٱلۡجِبَالِ فَقُلۡ يَنسِفُهَا رَبِّي نَسۡفࣰ ا
t: Wayasaloonaka AAani aljibali faqul yansifuha rabbee nasfan
u: Yeh log tumse poochte hain ke aakhir us din yeh pahad kahan chale jayenge? Kaho ke mera Rubb unko dhool banakar uda dega

ar: فَيَذَرُهَا قَاعࣰ ا صَفۡصَفࣰ ا
t: Fayatharuha qaAAan safsafan
u: Aur zameen ko aisa humwar chatiyal maidan bana dega (empty level plain)

ar: لَّا تَرَىٰ فِيهَا عِوَجࣰ ا وَلَآ أَمۡتࣰ ا
t: La tara feeha AAiwajan wala amtan
u: Ke ismein tum koi bal aur salwat (neither curve nor crease) na dekhoge

ar: يَوۡمَئِذࣲ يَتَّبِعُونَ ٱلدَّاعِيَ لَا عِوَجَ لَهُۥۖ وَخَشَعَتِ ٱلۡأَصۡوَاتُ لِلرَّحۡمَٰنِ فَلَا تَسۡمَعُ إِلَّا هَمۡسࣰ ا
t: Yawmaithin yattabiAAoona alddaAAiya la AAiwaja lahu wakhashaAAati alaswatu lilrrahmani fala tasmaAAu illa hamsan
u: Us roz sab log munadi (summoner /pukarne waley) ki pukar par seedhey chaley aayenge, koi zara akad na dikha sakega aur aawazein rehman ke aagey dub jayengi , ek sar-sarahat ke siwa tum kuch na sunoge

ar: يَوۡمَئِذࣲ لَّا تَنفَعُ ٱلشَّفَٰعَةُ إِلَّا مَنۡ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ وَرَضِيَ لَهُۥ قَوۡلࣰ ا
t: Yawmaithin la tanfaAAu alshshafaAAatu illa man athina lahu alrrahmanu waradiya lahu qawlan
u: Us roz shafaat (intercession) kaargar na hogi, illa yeh ke kisi ko rehman iski ijazat de aur uski baat sunna pasand karey

ar: يَعۡلَمُ مَا بَيۡنَ أَيۡدِيهِمۡ وَمَا خَلۡفَهُمۡ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِهِۦ عِلۡمࣰ ا
t: YaAAlamu ma bayna aydeehim wama khalfahum wala yuheetoona bihi AAilman
u: Woh logon ka agla pichla sub haal jaanta hai aur dusron ko iska poora ilm nahin hai

ar: ۞وَعَنَتِ ٱلۡوُجُوهُ لِلۡحَيِّ ٱلۡقَيُّومِۖ وَقَدۡ خَابَ مَنۡ حَمَلَ ظُلۡمࣰ ا
t: WaAAanati alwujoohu lilhayyi alqayyoomi waqad khaba man hamala thulman
u: Logon ke sar us hayyul qayyum (zinda aur qayam) ke aagey jhuk jayenge. Na-murad hoga jo us waqt kisi zulm ka baar (bojh)-e-gunaah uthaye huey ho

ar: وَمَن يَعۡمَلۡ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَهُوَ مُؤۡمِنࣱ فَلَا يَخَافُ ظُلۡمࣰ ا وَلَا هَضۡمࣰ ا
t: Waman yaAAmal mina alssalihati wahuwa muminun fala yakhafu thulman wala hadman
u: Aur kisi zulm ya haqq talafi ka khatra na hoga us shaks ko jo neik amal karey aur iske saath woh momin bhi ho

ar: وَكَذَٰلِكَ أَنزَلۡنَٰهُ قُرۡءَانًا عَرَبِيࣰّ ا وَصَرَّفۡنَا فِيهِ مِنَ ٱلۡوَعِيدِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَتَّقُونَ أَوۡ يُحۡدِثُ لَهُمۡ ذِكۡرࣰ ا
t: Wakathalika anzalnahu quranan AAarabiyyan wasarrafna feehi mina alwaAAeedi laAAallahum yattaqoona aw yuhdithu lahum thikran
u: Aur (aey Muhammad) isi tarah humne isey Quran e arabi bana kar nazil kiya hai aur ismein tarah tarah se tambihaat (warnings) ki hain shayad ke yeh log kajhrawi (perverseness) se bachein ya in mein kuch hosh ke aasaar is ki badaulat paida hon

ar: فَتَعَٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡمَلِكُ ٱلۡحَقُّۗ وَلَا تَعۡجَلۡ بِٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ مِن قَبۡلِ أَن يُقۡضَىٰٓ إِلَيۡكَ وَحۡيُهُۥۖ وَقُل رَّبِّ زِدۡنِي عِلۡمࣰ ا
t: FataAAala Allahu almaliku alhaqqu wala taAAjal bialqurani min qabli an yuqda ilayka wahyuhu waqul rabbi zidnee AAilman
u: Pas baala o bartar hai Allah, baadshah e haqiqi. Aur dekho, Quran padhne mein jaldi na kiya karo jabtak ke tumhari taraf uski wahee takmeel ko na pahunch jaye, aur dua karo ke aey parwardigar mujhey mazeed ilm ata kar

ar: وَلَقَدۡ عَهِدۡنَآ إِلَىٰٓ ءَادَمَ مِن قَبۡلُ فَنَسِيَ وَلَمۡ نَجِدۡ لَهُۥ عَزۡمࣰ ا
t: Walaqad AAahidna ila adama min qablu fanasiya walam najid lahu AAazman
u: Humne issey pehle Adam ko ek hukum diya tha, magar woh bhool gaya aur humne us mein azm (determination/firm resolve) na paya

ar: وَإِذۡ قُلۡنَا لِلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسۡجُدُواْ لِأٓدَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓاْ إِلَّآ إِبۡلِيسَ أَبَىٰ
t: Waith qulna lilmalaikati osjudoo liadama fasajadoo illa ibleesa aba
u: Yaad karo woh waqt jabke humne Farishton se kaha tha ke Adam ko sajda karo, woh sab to sajda kar gaye, magar ek iblis tha ke inkar kar baitha

ar: فَقُلۡنَا يَٰٓـَٔادَمُ إِنَّ هَٰذَا عَدُوࣱّ لَّكَ وَلِزَوۡجِكَ فَلَا يُخۡرِجَنَّكُمَا مِنَ ٱلۡجَنَّةِ فَتَشۡقَىٰٓ
t: Faqulna ya adamu inna hatha AAaduwwun laka walizawjika fala yukhrijannakuma mina aljannati fatashqa
u: Ispar humne Adam se kaha ke “dekho, yeh tumhara aur tumhari biwi ka dushman hai, aisa na ho ke yeh tumhein jannat se nikalwa de aur tum museebat mein padh jao

ar: إِنَّ لَكَ أَلَّا تَجُوعَ فِيهَا وَلَا تَعۡرَىٰ
t: Inna laka alla tajooAAa feeha wala taAAra
u: Yahan to tumhein yeh aasaishein (facilities) hasil hain ke na bhuke nange rehte ho

ar: وَأَنَّكَ لَا تَظۡمَؤُاْ فِيهَا وَلَا تَضۡحَىٰ
t: Waannaka la tathmao feeha wala tadha
u: Na pyas aur dhoop tumhein satati hai”

ar: فَوَسۡوَسَ إِلَيۡهِ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنُ قَالَ يَٰٓـَٔادَمُ هَلۡ أَدُلُّكَ عَلَىٰ شَجَرَةِ ٱلۡخُلۡدِ وَمُلۡكࣲ لَّا يَبۡلَىٰ
t: Fawaswasa ilayhi alshshaytanu qala ya adamu hal adulluka AAala shajarati alkhuldi wamulkin la yabla
u: Lekin shaytan ne usko phuslaya, kehne laga “Adam, bataun tumhein woh darakht jissey abadi zindagi aur la-zawal (everlasting) sultanat hasil hoti hai?”

ar: فَأَكَلَا مِنۡهَا فَبَدَتۡ لَهُمَا سَوۡءَٰتُهُمَا وَطَفِقَا يَخۡصِفَانِ عَلَيۡهِمَا مِن وَرَقِ ٱلۡجَنَّةِۚ وَعَصَىٰٓ ءَادَمُ رَبَّهُۥ فَغَوَىٰ
t: Faakala minha fabadat lahuma sawatuhuma watafiqa yakhsifani AAalayhima min waraqi aljannati waAAasa adamu rabbahu faghawa
u: Aakhir e kaar woh dono (miyan biwi) us darakht ka phal kha gaye, natija ye hua ke fawran hi unke satr (nakedness) ek dusre ke aagey khul gaye aur lagey dono apne aap ko jannat ke patton se dhankne. Adam ne apne Rubb ki nafarmani ki aur raah-e-raast se bhatak gaya

ar: ثُمَّ ٱجۡتَبَٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَتَابَ عَلَيۡهِ وَهَدَىٰ
t: Thumma ijtabahu rabbuhu fataba AAalayhi wahada
u: Phir uske Rubb ne usey barguzida kiya aur uski tawba qabool karli aur usey hidayat bakshi

ar: قَالَ ٱهۡبِطَا مِنۡهَا جَمِيعَۢاۖ بَعۡضُكُمۡ لِبَعۡضٍ عَدُوࣱّۖ فَإِمَّا يَأۡتِيَنَّكُم مِّنِّي هُدࣰ ى فَمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ هُدَايَ فَلَا يَضِلُّ وَلَا يَشۡقَىٰ
t: Qala ihbita minha jameeAAan baAAdukum libaAAdin AAaduwwun faimma yatiyannakum minnee hudan famani ittabaAAa hudaya fala yadillu wala yashqa
u: Aur farmaya “tum dono (fareeq, yaani Insaan aur shaytan) yahan se utar jao, tum ek dusre ke dushman rahogey. Ab agar meri taraf se tumhein koi hidayat pahunche to jo koi meri us hidayat ki pairwi karega woh na bhatkega na badbakhti mein mubtala hoga

ar: وَمَنۡ أَعۡرَضَ عَن ذِكۡرِي فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ مَعِيشَةࣰ ضَنكࣰ ا وَنَحۡشُرُهُۥ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ أَعۡمَىٰ
